title: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Income support scheme for eligible farmer families. Provides direct financial assistance in installments to help with agricultural input and household needs.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments through direct benefit transfer.
application_process: Apply through the official PM-KISAN portal or common service centre, then complete eKYC and land verification.

title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme for farmers facing losses from natural calamities, pests, or diseases. It reduces financial risk in agriculture and supports farm stability.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Insurance cover and claim support for notified crop losses.
application_process: Enroll through the PMFBY portal, bank, insurer, or authorized CSC before the crop season deadline.

title: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana
description: Umbrella irrigation scheme that improves water access and efficiency in farming. It supports micro-irrigation, water conservation, and better productivity.
benefits: Support for irrigation infrastructure and water-use efficiency measures.
application_process: Apply through the state agriculture or irrigation department under the relevant PMKSY component.

title: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan
description: Solar-powered agriculture scheme that helps farmers reduce diesel and electricity costs. It promotes solar pumps and decentralized renewable energy for farms.
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
benefits: Financial support for solar pumps and solar energy-based farm assets.
application_process: Apply through the designated state nodal agency or the official KUSUM portal.

title: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides soil testing information to farmers to improve fertilizer use and crop planning. The scheme supports scientific farming and better yields.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Soil testing report and fertilizer recommendation for the landholder.
application_process: Register through the agriculture department or local extension office for soil sample collection.

title: National Food Security Mission
description: Boosts production of rice, wheat, pulses, coarse cereals, and commercial crops. It helps farmers adopt improved seed, technology, and practices.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Support for inputs, demonstrations, and productivity enhancement measures.
application_process: Apply through the agriculture department or local extension system under mission activities.

title: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana
description: A flexible agriculture development scheme for state-level farming projects. It supports productivity, value addition, and farm infrastructure.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Assistance for agriculture projects, equipment, and value-chain activities.
application_process: Apply through the state agriculture department for projects approved under RKVY.

title: Mahila Kisan Sashaktikaran Pariyojana
description: Women-focused agriculture livelihood scheme that improves skills, resources, and income of women farmers. It promotes sustainable and group-based farming activities.
benefits: Training, livelihood support, and farm-based empowerment for women.
application_process: Apply through self-help groups, rural development offices, or designated implementing agencies.

title: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Maternity benefit scheme for pregnant and lactating women. It helps meet nutrition and wage-loss needs during pregnancy and childbirth.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Cash assistance during pregnancy and after childbirth as per scheme rules.
application_process: Apply through Anganwadi or the official PMMVY portal with required health and identity details.

title: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: A social campaign and scheme to improve child sex ratio and encourage education of girls. It supports awareness, protection, and empowerment of girls.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Awareness and community-level support for girls' education and safety.
application_process: Implemented through local government and district administration programs rather than direct individual application.

title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for the girl child to support future education and marriage expenses. It encourages long-term financial security for girls.
benefits: Interest-bearing savings account with tax advantages as per rules.
application_process: Open the account at a post office or authorized bank branch.

title: National Health Mission
description: Provides accessible and affordable healthcare through public health systems. It strengthens maternal health, child health, and disease control services.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Free or subsidized public health services through mission facilities.
application_process: Use government hospitals, health and wellness centres, or mission-linked facilities.

title: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
description: Health insurance scheme for vulnerable families. It covers hospitalization expenses and helps reduce out-of-pocket medical spending.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Health cover up to the scheme limit for eligible families.
application_process: Check eligibility and create the Ayushman card through the official portal or approved CSC.

title: Janani Suraksha Yojana
description: Safe motherhood scheme that promotes institutional delivery and maternal care. It reduces maternal and newborn risks through cash incentives and support.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Cash assistance for institutional childbirth and maternal care.
application_process: Register through an Anganwadi centre or government health facility during pregnancy.

title: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
description: Maternal health initiative that provides fixed-day checkups for pregnant women. It improves prenatal care and timely referral for high-risk pregnancies.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Free antenatal checkups and referral support.
application_process: Visit designated government health facilities on PM-SMMA days.

title: National Health Protection Scheme
description: A major health protection initiative for poor and vulnerable households. It is designed to improve access to tertiary care and hospital treatment.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Hospitalization and treatment support as per scheme coverage rules.
application_process: Use official beneficiary identification systems and empanelled hospitals.

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana Urban
description: Housing scheme for urban poor and middle-income families. It supports home ownership through interest subsidy and affordable housing options.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefits: Interest subsidy or housing assistance for eligible urban households.
application_process: Apply through the official PMAY-U portal or urban local body channels.

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana Gramin
description: Rural housing scheme for households without a pucca house. It provides assistance for constructing durable homes in villages.
benefits: Assistance for construction of a pucca house.
application_process: Beneficiaries are identified through official rural housing surveys and approved lists.

title: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana National Rural Livelihoods Mission
description: Supports women self-help groups and rural households to improve income and livelihoods. It promotes savings, credit access, and enterprise development.
benefits: SHG formation, credit linkage, and livelihood support.
application_process: Join through local self-help groups, block offices, or NRLM field teams.

title: Support to Training and Employment Programme for Women
description: Helps women from poor households gain skills and income opportunities. It supports training, mobilization, and livelihood linkages.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Skill support and employment-oriented assistance for women.
application_process: Apply through implementing NGOs or the official women and child development channels.

title: Mahila E-Haat
description: Online marketing platform for women entrepreneurs and self-help groups. It helps women sell products and services directly.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Digital marketplace access for women-led products and services.
application_process: Register on the official Mahila E-Haat platform with product and identity details.

title: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
description: Provides collateral-free loans to micro and small enterprises. It supports women, traders, and small entrepreneurs starting or expanding businesses.
benefits: Collateral-free business loans under Shishu, Kishore, and Tarun categories.
application_process: Apply through banks, NBFCs, or microfinance institutions under the MUDRA framework.

title: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
description: Supports setting up micro-enterprises in manufacturing and services. It is designed to generate employment and promote self-employment.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Subsidy support for setting up eligible micro enterprises.
application_process: Apply online through the PMEGP portal and complete bank and district-level approval steps.

title: Pradhan Mantri Rojgar Protsahan Yojana
description: Employment incentive scheme that encourages employers to hire more workers. It supports formal job creation and social security coverage.
benefits: Employer-side incentive for creating new employment opportunities.
application_process: Eligibility is generally routed through registered employers and EPFO-linked records.

title: Atmanirbhar Bharat Rozgar Yojana
description: Encourages new formal jobs by supporting employee and employer contributions in eligible establishments. It helps revive employment generation.
benefits: Contribution support for newly hired workers in covered establishments.
application_process: Usually through employer registration and EPFO compliance for eligible new hires.

title: Pradhan Mantri Vishwakarma
description: Supports traditional artisans and craftspeople with skill training, tool support, and market linkage. It helps small workers upgrade their craft-based livelihoods.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Training, toolkit assistance, credit support, and market access.
application_process: Apply through the official Vishwakarma portal or designated CSCs.

title: Stand-Up India
description: Promotes entrepreneurship among women and SC/ST borrowers. It facilitates bank loans for setting up greenfield enterprises.
benefits: Bank loan support for eligible women and SC/ST entrepreneurs.
application_process: Apply through the Stand-Up India portal and associated bank branch.

title: Mukhyamantri Majhi Ladki Bahin Yojana
description: Maharashtra’s women support scheme providing direct monthly assistance to eligible women. It aims to strengthen household income and women’s financial independence.
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Monthly financial assistance to eligible women.
application_process: Apply through Maharashtra government online services or designated centres with identity and income verification.

title: Shiv Bhojan Yojana
description: Maharashtra food support scheme that provides subsidized meals to poor and needy citizens. It is aimed at improving access to affordable food.
ministry: Food and Civil Supplies Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Subsidized lunch meals at selected centres.
application_process: Use the approved Shiv Bhojan centres as per district administration rules.

title: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Jan Arogya Yojana
description: State health insurance scheme for Maharashtra residents. It helps eligible families get cashless treatment in empanelled hospitals.
benefits: Cashless hospitalization cover for eligible families.
application_process: Use the official Maharashtra health insurance system or approved hospitals.

title: Udyogini Scheme Maharashtra
description: Supports women to start income-generating activities and micro-businesses. It is focused on financial inclusion and self-employment.
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Loan and livelihood support for women entrepreneurs.
application_process: Apply through district-level women development offices or linked banks.

title: Sanjay Gandhi Niradhar Anudan Yojana
description: Financial assistance scheme for destitute, disabled, and vulnerable persons in Maharashtra. It provides monthly support for basic living needs.
ministry: Social Justice and Special Assistance Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Monthly grant assistance to eligible vulnerable beneficiaries.
application_process: Apply through the district social welfare office or designated government portal.

title: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
description: Old age pension support for economically vulnerable senior citizens. It helps older people with regular pension assistance.
benefits: Monthly pension for eligible senior citizens.
application_process: Apply through the local panchayat, municipality, or social welfare office.

title: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
description: Pension scheme for eligible widows in vulnerable households. It offers regular support to improve financial security and dignity.
benefits: Monthly pension assistance for eligible widows.
application_process: Apply through the local administration under the National Social Assistance Programme.

title: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
description: Supports persons with disabilities who need regular income assistance. It helps improve daily living conditions for vulnerable households.
benefits: Monthly pension for eligible persons with disability.
application_process: Apply through the local social welfare office or NSAP channels.

title: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Scholarship scheme for Scheduled Caste students pursuing post-matric studies. It reduces education costs and supports higher studies.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Tuition, maintenance, and related education support.
application_process: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal or state scholarship portal.

title: Pre Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Provides support to Scheduled Caste students at school level. It encourages continued education and reduces dropout risk.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Scholarship support for school education.
application_process: Apply through the scholarship portal or the relevant state education authority.

title: Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students
description: Supports meritorious SC students in premier institutions. It covers major education expenses for higher studies.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Tuition and academic support for top-class institutions.
application_process: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal after admission to eligible institutions.

title: National Fellowship for OBC Students
description: Fellowship support for OBC students pursuing research degrees. It promotes advanced education and academic careers.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Monthly fellowship and contingency support.
application_process: Apply through the designated fellowship portal and university verification.

title: Pre Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: Helps OBC students continue school education. It reduces family burden and supports attendance and retention.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Scholarship assistance for pre-matric students.
application_process: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal or state scholarship system.

title: Top Class Education Scheme for OBC and EBC Students
description: Provides financial support to OBC and EBC students admitted to premier institutions. It covers major higher-education costs.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Tuition and related education assistance.
application_process: Apply through the scholarship portal after admission to approved institutions.

title: Scholarship for Top Class Education for Students with Disabilities
description: Scholarship for students with disabilities pursuing higher studies. It helps cover education expenses in recognized institutions.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Tuition and academic support for eligible students with disabilities.
application_process: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal and verify disability status.

title: Post Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
description: Supports students with disabilities studying after matriculation. It encourages completion of higher secondary, diploma, and degree programs.
ministry: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
benefits: Scholarship assistance for post-matric education.
application_process: Apply via the scholarship portal or state disability welfare department.

title: Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase of Fitting of Aids and Appliances
description: Provides aids and assistive devices to persons with disabilities. It improves mobility, independence, and access to daily life.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Assistive devices and support for fitting of aids.
application_process: Apply through ADIP camps, district disability offices, or authorized agencies.

title: Deendayal Disabled Rehabilitation Scheme
description: Supports organizations working for the rehabilitation of persons with disabilities. It helps provide education, training, and rehabilitation services.
ministry: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
benefits: Rehabilitation and institutional support for disability-focused services.
application_process: Apply through the department’s grant and NGO support procedures.

title: PM Young Achievers Scholarship Award Scheme for Vibrant India
description: Scholarship support for deserving students from OBC, EBC, and DNT communities. It promotes continuation of quality education.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Scholarship assistance for selected school-level students.
application_process: Apply through the designated scholarship examination and portal process.

title: Pre Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
description: Supports school-going children with disabilities. It helps families bear education costs and encourages school completion.
ministry: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
benefits: Scholarship support for school education.
application_process: Apply through the official scholarship portal with disability verification.

title: Rajarshi Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Merit Scholarship
description: Maharashtra scholarship that supports meritorious students from disadvantaged communities. It helps cover educational expenses and encourages higher performance.
ministry: School Education and Sports Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Scholarship for eligible meritorious students in Maharashtra.
application_process: Apply through the Maharashtra scholarship portal or the education department.

title: E-Sanjivani Health Service Maharashtra
description: Digital health consultation support system for Maharashtra residents. It improves access to medical advice and primary care services.
benefits: Telemedicine consultations and digital health support.
application_process: Use the official eSanjeevani platform or linked health facilities.

title: Annapurna Yojana Maharashtra
description: Food security support for vulnerable households in Maharashtra. It aims to improve access to subsidized essentials.
ministry: Food, Civil Supplies and Consumer Protection Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Food support or subsidized essentials for eligible households.
application_process: Apply through district supply offices or the state welfare system.

title: Maharashtra Entrepreneurship Development and Loan Support
description: State support for entrepreneurs and self-employed persons needing finance and guidance. It aims to increase local enterprise and jobs.
benefits: Loan facilitation, guidance, and support for small businesses.
application_process: Apply through Maharashtra industry or district entrepreneurship offices.

title: Maharashtra State Rural Employment Guarantee Support
description: Employment support for rural workers in Maharashtra through local public works and livelihood activities. It improves income security in villages.
benefits: Local employment opportunities and wage support.
application_process: Register with the local Gram Panchayat or employment office.

title: Maharashtra Farmer Support and Input Assistance Scheme
description: State agriculture support scheme for farmers facing cultivation costs and input needs. It aims to improve farm productivity and resilience.
benefits: Subsidy or input support for eligible farmers.
application_process: Apply through the Maharashtra agriculture department or local agriculture office.

title: Maharashtra Artisan Pension Support
description: Support scheme for ageing traditional workers and artisans in Maharashtra. It provides income assistance for those with limited earning capacity.
ministry: Social Justice and Special Assistance Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Pension assistance for eligible artisans and self-employed elders.
application_process: Apply through the social welfare office or state pension system.

title: Maharashtra Disability Aid and Support Scheme
description: State support for persons with disabilities to access aids, assistance, and welfare benefits. It aims to improve mobility and daily independence.
ministry: Social Justice and Special Assistance Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Assistive support and welfare benefits for eligible persons with disabilities.
application_process: Apply through district social welfare offices or state disability channels.

title: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Financial assistance of Rs. 6000 per year to small and marginal farmers.
benefits: Rs. 6000 per year in 3 installments of Rs. 2000 directly to bank account.
application_process: Apply online at pmkisan.gov.in or visit nearest CSC center.

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban)
description: Housing for all urban poor by 2022. Provides financial assistance for construction or purchase of house.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

eligibility.condition: Should not own a pucca house

benefits: Subsidy up to Rs. 2.67 lakh on home loan interest.
application_process: Apply at pmaymis.gov.in or nearest urban local body office.

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Gramin)
description: Financial assistance to rural poor for construction of pucca house.

eligibility.condition: Should be houseless or living in kutcha house

benefits: Rs. 1.20 lakh in plain areas and Rs. 1.30 lakh in hilly areas for house construction.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or pmayg.nic.in

title: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG connections to women from Below Poverty Line households.
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
benefits: Free LPG connection with first refill and stove.
application_process: Apply at nearest LPG distributor or pmuy.gov.in

title: Post Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Financial assistance to ST students pursuing post matriculation education.
benefits: Maintenance allowance and fee reimbursement for ST students.
application_process: Apply at scholarships.gov.in (National Scholarship Portal)

title: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households.
benefits: 100 days of guaranteed wage employment at minimum wages.
application_process: Register at nearest Gram Panchayat office.

title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Financial inclusion program to ensure access to financial services for all households.
benefits: Zero balance bank account, RuPay debit card, Rs. 2 lakh accident insurance, Rs. 30,000 life cover.
application_process: Visit any bank branch or Business Correspondent with Aadhaar.

title: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers to provide fixed monthly pension after age 60.

eligibility.condition: Should have a savings bank account

benefits: Fixed monthly pension of Rs. 1000 to Rs. 5000 after age 60.
application_process: Apply at bank branch or through net banking.

title: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accidental death and disability insurance cover for bank account holders.
benefits: Rs. 2 lakh for accidental death. Rs. 1 lakh for partial disability. Premium only Rs. 20/year.
application_process: Apply at bank branch or through net banking/mobile banking.

title: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme offering coverage for death due to any reason.
benefits: Rs. 2 lakh life cover for death due to any reason. Premium Rs. 436/year.
application_process: Apply at bank branch or through net banking.

title: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
description: Promotes apprenticeship training by sharing stipend cost between government and employers.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefits: Stipend support during apprenticeship training. Skill certification on completion.
application_process: Register at apprenticeshipindia.gov.in

title: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme
description: Financial assistance to startups for proof of concept, prototype development and market entry.

eligibility.condition: DPIIT recognized startup less than 2 years old

benefits: Up to Rs. 20 lakh for validation. Up to Rs. 50 lakh for market entry.
application_process: Apply at seedfund.startupindia.gov.in

title: e-Shram Portal Registration
description: National database of unorganized workers for delivery of social security schemes.

eligibility.condition: Unorganized sector worker not covered under EPFO/ESIC

benefits: Rs. 2 lakh accident insurance. Access to all social security schemes.
application_process: Register at eshram.gov.in or nearest CSC center.

title: Prime Minister Scholarship Scheme for Ex-Servicemen
description: Scholarship for wards and widows of ex-servicemen and ex-coast guard personnel.
benefits: Rs. 2500/month for boys and Rs. 3000/month for girls for professional courses.
application_process: Apply at ksb.gov.in

title: Mahaswayam Employment Registration
description: Maharashtra government employment portal for job seekers to register and find employment opportunities.
benefits: Job matching, employment guidance, skill development opportunities.
application_process: Register at mahaswayam.gov.in

title: Maharashtra DBT Agriculture Scheme
description: Direct benefit transfer for farmers in Maharashtra for agricultural inputs and subsidies.
benefits: Direct subsidy on seeds, fertilizers, and agricultural equipment.
application_process: Apply at dbt.mahapocra.gov.in

title: Annasaheb Patil Arthik Magas Vikas Mahamandal Loan
description: Loan scheme for economically backward open category candidates in Maharashtra.
benefits: Interest subsidy on loans up to Rs. 10 lakh for business.
application_process: Apply at mahaswayam.gov.in/mahaAaple

title: Maharashtra Yellow Ration Card Scheme
description: Subsidized food grains for Below Poverty Line families in Maharashtra.
ministry: Food, Civil Supplies and Consumer Protection Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Subsidized rice, wheat, and other food grains at very low prices.
application_process: Apply at nearest ration office or Aaple Sarkar portal.

title: Kisan Credit Card Scheme
description: Provides farmers with affordable short-term credit for agricultural inputs, allied activities, and consumption needs. Operates through a revolving credit system via banks.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Revolving credit limit up to ₹3 lakh at subsidized interest rate of 4% p.a. with timely repayment.
application_process: Apply at nearest bank branch or through PM-KISAN portal linked KCC facility.

title: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana
description: Promotes organic farming through cluster-based approach and PGS certification. Farmers get support for input production, value addition, and marketing of organic produce.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: ₹50,000 per hectare over 3 years for organic conversion, inputs, certification, and marketing.
application_process: Apply through state agriculture department or join a local cluster group for PGS certification.

title: Micro Irrigation Fund
description: Dedicated fund to expand micro-irrigation coverage beyond PMKSY targets. It provides low-interest loans to states for drip and sprinkler irrigation projects.
benefits: Subsidy on drip and sprinkler irrigation systems; up to 55% for small/marginal farmers.
application_process: Apply through state agriculture or horticulture department under PMKSY-PDMC component.

title: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund
description: Medium to long-term debt financing for post-harvest management and agri-logistics infrastructure. Supports cold chains, warehouses, processing units, and primary processing centres.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Interest subvention of 3% per annum on loans up to ₹2 crore for agri-infrastructure projects.
application_process: Apply through the AIF portal at agriinfra.dac.gov.in or through participating banks.

title: Per Drop More Crop Scheme
description: Focuses on efficient on-farm water use through micro-irrigation systems and secondary agriculture activities. It is a sub-scheme under PMKSY for water productivity.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Up to 55% subsidy for small/marginal farmers and 45% for others on micro-irrigation equipment.
application_process: Apply through the state horticulture or agriculture department under PMKSY-PDMC.

title: National Livestock Mission
description: Promotes sustainable development of the livestock sector including poultry, goatry, piggery, and fodder. It ensures availability of fodder and livestock insurance.
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
benefits: Subsidy and support for livestock purchase, fodder, shed construction, and insurance premium.
application_process: Apply through the state animal husbandry department or district livestock office.

title: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana
description: Flagship scheme for fisheries sector development aimed at sustainable and responsible fisheries development and enhancing fish production and fishers' income.
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
benefits: Subsidy on fish farming infrastructure, boats, nets, cold storage, and accidental insurance of ₹5 lakh.
application_process: Apply through state fisheries department or pmmsy.gov.in portal.

title: Animal Husbandry Infrastructure Development Fund
description: Incentivizes private investment in dairy and meat processing and value addition infrastructure. Supports entrepreneurs and farmer producer organizations in the animal husbandry sector.
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
benefits: 3% interest subvention on loans up to ₹2 crore for dairy, meat, and animal feed processing units.
application_process: Apply through the AHIDF portal or participating scheduled banks.

title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: Provides health insurance coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. Covers over 10 crore poor and vulnerable families.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Cashless health coverage up to ₹5 lakh per year covering 1,500+ medical procedures.
application_process: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or at empanelled hospital with Aadhaar card.

title: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana
description: Smart card-based health insurance for unorganized sector workers and their families below poverty line. Covers hospitalization expenses at empanelled hospitals.
benefits: Cashless hospitalization up to ₹30,000 per family per year at empanelled hospitals.
application_process: Enroll through district labour office or state nodal agency under RSBY.

title: Ayushman Bharat Health and Wellness Centres
description: Upgrades sub-health centres and PHCs to provide comprehensive primary healthcare including NCDs, mental health, and AYUSH services closer to people.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Free OPD, diagnostics, essential medicines, maternal and child services at upgraded primary health centres.
application_process: Directly visit nearest Ayushman Bharat Health and Wellness Centre in your area.

title: Pradhan Mantri National Dialysis Programme
description: Provides free dialysis services to patients with kidney failure through public-private partnerships at district hospitals. Aims to reduce the financial burden of renal disease.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Free dialysis sessions (up to 156 sessions per year) at empanelled district hospital PPP centres.
application_process: Register at the district hospital dialysis centre with referral from government doctor.

title: Mission Indradhanush
description: Intensive immunization programme to vaccinate all children under 2 years and pregnant women against vaccine-preventable diseases across India.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Free vaccination against 12 vaccine-preventable diseases for children and pregnant women.
application_process: Attend vaccination drives organized at local ASHA/AWC or government health facility.

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Gramin
description: Provides assistance to rural BPL households for construction of pucca houses with basic amenities. Each beneficiary gets direct bank transfer for house construction.
benefits: ₹1.20 lakh (plains) or ₹1.30 lakh (hilly areas) for house construction with additional support for toilets.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or AwaasSoft portal; beneficiaries selected from SECC data.

title: Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme
description: Provides interest subsidy on home loans to EWS, LIG, and MIG categories under PMAY-Urban for purchase or construction of a house. Subsidy is upfront and credited to loan account.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefits: Interest subsidy of 3–6.5% on home loans ranging from ₹6 lakh to ₹12 lakh depending on income category.
application_process: Apply through the bank or housing finance company offering CLSS loans under PMAY.

title: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana Housing Component
description: Provides housing to rural youth who have been trained and placed under DDU-GKY. Ensures dignified living for rural job-linked beneficiaries.
benefits: Placement-linked housing support for rural poor youth who complete skills training under DDU-GKY.
application_process: Enroll in DDU-GKY training at nearest project implementing agency and avail housing support post-placement.

title: Swachh Bharat Mission – Individual Household Latrine
description: Provides financial incentive to rural BPL and APL households to construct individual household toilets. Part of the ODF (Open Defecation Free) mission.
benefits: ₹12,000 incentive for construction of individual household toilet linked to SBM-G eligibility.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or SBM portal; construction verified before fund release.

title: Mahila Shakti Kendra
description: Provides a platform for rural women to interact with government services including skill development, digital literacy, and health and nutrition support.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Access to skill training, digital literacy, legal aid, and health services through block-level Mahila Shakti Kendra.
application_process: Contact nearest Block Level Mahila Shakti Kendra or district WCD office to enroll.

title: One Stop Centre Scheme (Sakhi)
description: Provides integrated support and assistance to women affected by violence under one roof including medical, legal, psychological, shelter, and police facilitation services.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Free shelter (up to 5 days), medical, legal, psychological support, and police assistance for violence-affected women.
documents: Aadhaar Card or any ID proof
application_process: Contact nearest Sakhi One Stop Centre or call helpline 181 for immediate assistance.

title: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Maternity benefit programme providing cash incentives to pregnant women and lactating mothers for first living child. Compensates for wage loss during pregnancy and promotes breastfeeding.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: ₹5,000 in three installments for first child; additional ₹6,000 for second child if girl.
application_process: Register at nearest Anganwadi Centre or PHC and submit installment claims with required documents.

title: Nari Shakti Puraskar
description: National awards to recognize and honour women and institutions for their outstanding contribution to women empowerment across various fields.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Cash award of ₹2 lakh and certificate of merit from the President of India.
application_process: Submit nomination through the WCD Ministry portal before the annual deadline.

title: Working Women Hostel Scheme
description: Provides safe and affordable hostel accommodation to working women in urban, semi-urban, and rural areas. Includes crèche facility for children.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Subsidized hostel accommodation near workplace with optional crèche facility for children up to 12 years.
application_process: Apply to nearby working women hostel managed by state WCD department or NGOs under the scheme.

title: Support to Training and Employment Programme for Women
description: Provides skills training to poor and marginalised women to enable them to take up employment or self-employment. Covers traditional trades and emerging livelihood sectors.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Free vocational training, tool kit, market linkage support, and placement assistance.
application_process: Apply through the state WCD department or NGO project implementing agency under STEP.

title: Swadhar Greh Scheme
description: Provides temporary institutional support for women in difficult circumstances including domestic violence survivors, trafficked women, and homeless women.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Free shelter, food, clothing, counseling, legal aid, medical support, and vocational training for rehabilitation.
documents: Any identity proof or FIR/Medical Report in case of crisis
application_process: Contact district WCD office, 181 helpline, or nearby Swadhar Greh facility for admission.

title: Kisan Vikas Patra
description: Small savings certificate scheme where the investment doubles in a fixed period. A risk-free savings option available at post offices across India.
benefits: Investment doubles in approximately 115 months at 7.5% per annum; premature encashment allowed after 30 months.
application_process: Purchase KVP certificate at nearest post office or designated bank branch.

title: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana
description: Provides all-weather road connectivity to eligible unconnected habitations in rural India. Improves access to markets, schools, and health centres for villagers.
benefits: All-weather paved road connecting habitations to main road network at no cost to residents.
application_process: Habitation demands are processed through Gram Panchayat and state rural development department.

title: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
description: Guarantees 100 days of unskilled wage employment per year to rural households. Provides livelihood security and creates durable rural assets.
benefits: 100 days of guaranteed wage employment per household per year at statutory minimum wage.
application_process: Apply for Job Card at Gram Panchayat office; thereafter apply for work demand at GP level.

title: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana – National Rural Livelihood Mission
description: Mobilizes rural poor into self-help groups and supports them with credit, skill training, and market linkage for sustainable livelihoods.
benefits: SHG formation support, revolving fund up to ₹15,000, community investment fund, and skill training support.
application_process: Join a SHG formed under NRLM or contact block mission management unit for enrollment.

title: Jal Jeevan Mission
description: Aims to provide safe and adequate tap water supply to every rural household through functional household tap connections by 2024.
benefits: Functional household tap connection providing safe potable water at home for every rural family.
application_process: Demand registered through Gram Panchayat; village water committees manage supply under JJM.

title: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
description: Provides free LPG connections to women from BPL households to replace harmful solid cooking fuel use. Targets rural women's health and indoor air quality improvement.
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
benefits: Free LPG connection including cylinder, regulator, and hose; first refill provided at subsidized or free rate.
application_process: Apply at nearest LPG distributor with BPL card or SECC eligibility for free connection.

title: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana – National Urban Livelihood Mission
description: Reduces urban poverty through skill development, self-employment, and social mobilization of urban poor into SHGs for sustainable livelihoods.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefits: Skill training, interest subsidy on self-employment loans, SHG revolving funds, and shelter for homeless.
application_process: Contact city livelihood centre or municipality under DAY-NULM to enroll in training or SHG.

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana 2.0 – Urban
description: Revamped urban housing scheme targeting EWS and LIG families with interest subsidy on home loans and direct assistance for house construction or purchase.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefits: Up to ₹2.5 lakh central assistance or interest subsidy on home loans for EWS/LIG first-time homebuyers.
application_process: Apply through ULB or pmaymis.gov.in; select appropriate component based on eligibility.

title: National Urban Health Mission
description: Improves health status of urban poor and other vulnerable sections by providing accessible and affordable primary health care through urban PHCs and health wellness centres.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Free OPD, diagnostics, medicines, maternal care, and immunization at urban health centres.
application_process: Visit nearest urban primary health centre or health wellness centre under NUHM.

title: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Provides accidental death and disability insurance cover at just ₹20 per year premium. Available to all bank account holders aged 18 to 70 years.
benefits: ₹2 lakh for accidental death or total permanent disability; ₹1 lakh for partial permanent disability.
application_process: Enroll through bank branch, net banking, or bank correspondence; ₹20 annual premium auto-debited.

title: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme at a low annual premium of ₹436 per year for bank account holders. Provides ₹2 lakh life cover in case of death due to any reason.
benefits: ₹2 lakh life insurance cover at ₹436/year premium; coverage renewed annually.
application_process: Enroll through bank branch or net banking by giving consent and auto-debit mandate.

title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
description: National mission for financial inclusion to provide access to banking, insurance, credit, and pension services. Zero balance savings account with RuPay debit card and overdraft facility.
benefits: Zero-balance bank account, RuPay card, ₹2 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life cover, and overdraft up to ₹10,000.
documents: Aadhaar Card or any officially valid document
application_process: Visit nearest bank branch with Aadhaar or valid ID to open a PMJDY account.

title: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Facilitates bank loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to set up greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services, or trading sector.
benefits: Composite loan between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprise; repayable in 7 years.
application_process: Apply at bank branch or standupmitra.in portal for composite loan under Stand-Up India.

title: Mission Poshan 2.0
description: Strengthens nutritional content, delivery, outreach, and outcome by merging ICDS and other nutrition schemes into a holistic approach.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Supplementary nutrition, health check-ups, immunization, pre-school education through Anganwadi Centres.
application_process: Register at nearest Anganwadi Centre for nutrition, health, and early childhood services.

title: National Food Security Act – Public Distribution System
description: Provides subsidized food grains (rice, wheat, coarse grains) to priority households and Antyodaya Anna Yojana families through fair price shops.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
benefits: 5 kg of food grains per person per month at ₹1-₹3 per kg; Antyodaya families get 35 kg per month.
application_process: Obtain ration card through state food department; collect grains monthly from designated fair price shop.

title: Antyodaya Anna Yojana
description: Targets the poorest of the poor families with subsidized food grains at the lowest priority under the PDS. Each household gets 35 kg of grains per month at nominal rates.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
benefits: 35 kg wheat at ₹2/kg and rice at ₹3/kg per month for the poorest households.
application_process: Get identified by state food department as AAY beneficiary and obtain AAY ration card.

title: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana
description: Flagship skill development scheme enabling Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training and improve their employability and earnings.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefits: Free short-term skill training (200–600 hours), placement assistance, and ₹8,000 reward for RPL certification.
application_process: Register on the PMKVY portal at pmkvyofficial.org or visit nearest training partner.

title: Garib Kalyan Rozgar Abhiyan
description: Employment scheme for migrant workers returning to rural areas that combines 25 public works schemes into a concentrated campaign to provide jobs and create durable assets.
benefits: Guaranteed employment in public works at statutory wage; skill training and links to MGNREGS.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat in identified districts for wage employment under GKRA.

title: Van Dhan Vikas Kendra Scheme
description: Promotes tribal entrepreneurship by setting up clusters of self-help groups for value addition to minor forest produce. Helps tribal communities earn more from forest resources.
benefits: ₹15 lakh grant per VDVK cluster for equipment, training, and working capital to process and market MFP.
application_process: Tribal communities can register through TRIFED or state tribal cooperative for VDVK formation.

title: National Bamboo Mission
description: Promotes the growth of the bamboo sector for economic improvement of farmers and creates a sustained supply chain for bamboo products including furniture, handicrafts, and biofuel.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Subsidized planting material, training, tool kits, and market linkage support for bamboo cultivation and processing.
application_process: Apply through state horticulture department or bamboo mission nodal agency.

title: National Agriculture Market (e-NAM)
description: Pan-India electronic trading portal that links existing APMC mandis to create a unified national market for agricultural commodities.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Online price discovery, transparent trade, and direct payment for farm produce through registered mandis.
application_process: Register at enam.gov.in or through the nearest integrated e-NAM mandi.

title: Formation and Promotion of 10,000 FPOs Scheme
description: Central scheme to form 10,000 Farmer Producer Organisations providing collective bargaining power, shared resources, and better market access to smallholder farmers.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: Equity grant up to ₹15 lakh per FPO, credit guarantee, and handholding for 3 years through CBBO.
application_process: Form FPO through a CBBO (Cluster Based Business Organisation) and register under the scheme.

title: PM CARES for Children Scheme
description: Provides comprehensive support to children who lost both parents or sole guardian to COVID-19 including education, health, and monthly financial assistance until age 23.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: ₹10 lakh corpus at age 18, monthly stipend, Ayushman Bharat coverage, and free school/college education.
application_process: Apply through District Magistrate office or pmcaresforchildren.in portal with supporting documents.

title: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
description: Incentivizes employers to engage apprentices by sharing stipend costs with the government. Provides industry-relevant on-the-job training to youth across multiple trades.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefits: Monthly stipend (government shares 25% up to ₹1,500); recognized certificate and experience.
application_process: Register at apprenticeshipindia.org and apply to available apprenticeship openings.

title: National Social Assistance Programme
description: Provides social security in the form of pension to elderly, widows, disabled persons, and BPL families in case of death of breadwinner.
benefits: ₹200–₹500/month pension for elderly; ₹300/month for widows; ₹300/month for disabled BPL persons.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office with relevant certificates.

title: Integrated Child Development Services
description: World's largest early childhood care and development programme providing supplementary nutrition, immunization, health checkup, referral services, and pre-school education through Anganwadi Centres.
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefits: Free supplementary nutrition, immunization, health checkup, pre-school education at Anganwadi Centre.
application_process: Register child at nearest Anganwadi Centre with birth certificate and parent Aadhaar.

title: PM SVANidhi – Street Vendor Scheme
description: Provides affordable working capital loans to street vendors to restart livelihoods impacted by COVID-19. Offers incentive for digital transactions and credit upgrade.
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefits: Collateral-free loans: ₹10,000 (1st), ₹20,000 (2nd), ₹50,000 (3rd cycle); 7% interest subsidy; digital rewards.
documents: Vendor Certificate or Identity Card from ULB
application_process: Apply at pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in or through MFI, NBFC, bank, or nearest ULB office.

title: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme
description: Scholarships to meritorious students of economically weaker sections to arrest dropout at Class 8 and encourage continuation of studies at secondary level.
benefits: ₹12,000 per year (₹1,000/month) for Classes 9 to 12 through direct bank transfer.
application_process: Appear in NMMS state-level exam; apply through scholarships.gov.in after selection.

title: Post-Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Financial support to Scheduled Tribe students to pursue post-matriculation education by covering maintenance and course fees.
benefits: Course fee reimbursement plus maintenance allowance; varies by level (professional/non-professional) and residence.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in or state tribal welfare department before the deadline.

title: Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: Encourages OBC students to pursue higher education by providing financial assistance for post-matriculation studies across India.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Maintenance allowance and reimbursement of course fees for post-matric courses.
application_process: Apply on scholarships.gov.in or state Social Welfare department portal.

title: Pre-Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Reduces economic barrier for ST students to complete classes 9 and 10 by providing scholarship covering maintenance and other expenses.
benefits: Maintenance allowance and ad-hoc grant for hostellers and day scholars in Classes 9–10.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in or state tribal welfare department portal.

title: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
description: Recognizes meritorious students from low-income families who secured top scores in Class 12 boards for pursuing higher education at degree level.
benefits: ₹10,000/year for first three years and ₹20,000/year for fourth and fifth year of graduation/postgrad.
application_process: Apply on scholarships.gov.in within prescribed time; selection based on board exam merit.

title: National Fellowship for SC Students
description: Provides Junior Research Fellowship and Senior Research Fellowship to SC students pursuing M.Phil and Ph.D in universities and research institutions.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: JRF: ₹31,000/month; SRF: ₹35,000/month plus HRA and contingency allowance for 5 years.
application_process: Apply through UGC or the National Fellowship portal for SC students.

title: Rajiv Gandhi National Fellowship for ST Students
description: Supports ST students pursuing M.Phil and Ph.D with monthly fellowship and contingency allowance to promote research culture among tribal communities.
benefits: JRF: ₹31,000/month; SRF: ₹35,000/month plus HRA and contingency for up to 5 years.
application_process: Apply through the National Scholarship Portal or UGC fellowship section.

title: Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students
description: Supports SC students enrolled in top institutes like IITs, IIMs, NLUs, and AIIMS by covering full tuition, living expenses, and other study costs.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement plus ₹2,220/month for living expenses and book allowance.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in after securing admission in a notified top institution.

title: Top Class Education Scheme for ST Students
description: Covers full study expenses for ST students admitted to premier institutions like IITs, IIMs, NLUs, NITs, and medical colleges.
benefits: Complete tuition fee, living expenses, and book allowance for the course duration.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in after admission in a notified premier institution.

title: National Overseas Scholarship for SC and OBC Students
description: Provides financial support to SC and OBC students for pursuing Masters and Ph.D programmes abroad at reputed foreign universities.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Visa fee, passage, tuition fee, and maintenance allowance for study abroad for up to 4 years.
application_process: Apply through socialjustice.gov.in during the announced scholarship window.

title: Eklavya Model Residential Schools Scheme
description: Provides residential schooling of the same quality as Navodaya Vidyalayas to tribal students in remote areas with special focus on ST culture and education.
benefits: Free residential education from Class 6 to 12 with meals, uniforms, books, and sports facilities.
application_process: Apply through district tribal welfare office or nearest EMRS for annual admission test.

title: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Scheme
description: Provides good quality modern education to talented children predominantly from rural areas irrespective of family background in fully residential schools.
benefits: Free residential education including board, lodging, uniforms, textbooks, and stationery from Class 6 to 12.
application_process: Appear in Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Selection Test (JNVST) for Class 6 admission.

title: PM POSHAN – Pradhan Mantri Poshan Shakti Nirman
description: Provides hot cooked nutritious meals to all students in government and government-aided schools to improve nutrition and enrollment in primary and upper-primary classes.
benefits: Free nutritious hot mid-day meal every school day; covers primary and upper primary classes.
application_process: Automatic benefit for students enrolled in government or government-aided schools.

title: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
description: Integrated scheme covering school education from pre-school to Class 12 for improving quality, equity, and access in school education across India.
benefits: Free textbooks, uniforms (2 sets/year to SC/ST/BPL girls), digital classrooms, library, and quality teachers.
application_process: Automatic benefit for students enrolled in government schools under Samagra Shiksha.

title: DIKSHA – Digital Infrastructure for Knowledge Sharing
description: National digital infrastructure for teachers and students providing curriculum-linked learning resources, teacher training modules, and assessments in multiple languages.
benefits: Free access to textbook-linked digital content, assessments, and teacher-training resources in 18 languages.
application_process: Access freely via diksha.gov.in website or DIKSHA mobile app.

title: Scheme for Implementation of RTE in Special Focus Districts
description: Ensures access to elementary education for children in difficult circumstances under the Right to Education Act with special attention to disadvantaged groups.
benefits: Free and compulsory elementary education, free textbooks, uniforms, and mid-day meals under RTE.
application_process: Enroll at nearest government school; contact district education officer for admission under RTE quota.

title: Pradhan Mantri Vidya Lakshmi Karyakram
description: Single-window platform for students to access education loans from banks for higher education in India and abroad, with interest subsidy for eligible students.
benefits: Education loans from multiple banks; interest subsidy for EWS students; up to ₹75 lakh for study abroad.
application_process: Apply through vidyalakshmi.co.in and select preferred bank for education loan.

title: Special Scholarship Scheme for North Eastern Students
description: Supports students from North Eastern states to pursue higher technical and professional education in premier institutions outside their home state.
ministry: Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region
benefits: ₹3,850/month maintenance and ₹30,000/year for tuition and incidental charges for degree-level courses.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in portal during the announced scholarship window.

title: Dr. Ambedkar Post-Matric Scholarship for EBC Students
description: Provides scholarship to Economically Backward Class students who are not covered under SC, ST, or OBC categories to pursue post-matriculation studies.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Maintenance allowance and reimbursement of tuition fees for post-matric studies.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in under the Dr. Ambedkar Post Matric Scholarship scheme.

title: Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
description: Pre-matric and post-matric scholarships for students with benchmark disabilities to ensure educational continuity and reduce financial burden.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: ₹500–₹1,000/month maintenance allowance plus book and stationery grant at pre and post-matric levels.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in within the prescribed academic year window.

title: Deendayal Disabled Rehabilitation Scheme
description: Provides financial assistance to NGOs for implementing projects ensuring rehabilitation of persons with disabilities including education, training, and early intervention.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free early intervention, special education, vocational training, and community-based rehabilitation services.
application_process: Approach NGOs or special schools funded under DDRS in your district for enrollment.

title: Unique Disability Identity Card (UDID)
description: Provides a Unique Disability Identity Card to persons with disabilities to enable them to access government schemes and benefits seamlessly with a single card.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Single identity card for easy access to all disability benefits, schemes, and concessions at national level.
application_process: Apply through UDID portal at swavlambancard.gov.in or nearest district hospital for assessment.

title: Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase of Aids and Appliances (ADIP)
description: Provides assistive devices and aids to persons with disabilities from low-income families to enhance their physical, social, and psychological rehabilitation.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free or subsidized assistive devices such as wheelchairs, hearing aids, crutches, tricycles, braille kits.
application_process: Apply through ALIMCO distribution camps or District Disability Rehabilitation Centre.

title: National Handicapped Finance and Development Corporation Loan Scheme
description: Provides concessional loans to persons with disabilities for income generation activities, education, and purchase of assistive devices to promote self-reliance.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Loans up to ₹5 lakh for self-employment at 5% interest; ₹1.5 lakh for education at 4% per annum.
application_process: Apply through NHFDC state channelizing agencies or state corporations for disabled persons.

title: Accessible India Campaign (Sugamya Bharat Abhiyan)
description: Aims to make built environment, transportation, and ICT ecosystem accessible to persons with disabilities to ensure equal participation in societal life.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Accessible government buildings, transport, and ICT tools for persons with disabilities.
application_process: Report accessibility barriers through the Sugamya Bharat app or portal.

title: Babu Jagjivan Ram Chhatrawas Yojana
description: Provides hostel facilities to SC and OBC students studying in pre-matric and post-matric courses at schools and colleges by constructing hostels through state governments and NGOs.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Subsidized or free hostel accommodation including food, meals, and study facilities near school or college.
application_process: Apply through the nearest government hostel run by state social welfare department or NGO under this scheme.

title: Tribal Research Institutes Grant-in-Aid Scheme
description: Supports state Tribal Research Institutes to conduct research on tribes, document traditions, spread literacy, and study issues affecting tribal communities.
benefits: Research opportunities, documentation support, and institutional capacity building for tribal welfare.
application_process: Contact state tribal research institute or tribal welfare ministry for research fellowship or grants.

title: PM SHRI Schools Scheme
description: Upgrades selected government schools as model schools with modern infrastructure, labs, sports, libraries, and smart classrooms aligned with National Education Policy 2020.
benefits: Access to upgraded school with smart classroom, lab, library, sports, and holistic NEP-aligned curriculum.
application_process: Enroll at a designated PM SHRI School in your area through standard school admission process.

title: Nai Roshni – Leadership Development for Minority Women
description: Empowers minority women by providing knowledge, tools, and techniques of interfacing with government systems and developing leadership skills.
benefits: Leadership training covering life skills, legal rights, health literacy, digital literacy, and financial awareness.
application_process: Enroll through NGO implementing Nai Roshni in your area or district minority welfare office.

title: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship for Professional and Technical Courses for Minorities
description: Supports minority community students pursuing professional or technical courses at graduation and post-graduation level based on merit and economic need.
benefits: Up to ₹20,000/year course fee and ₹10,000/year maintenance for professional courses.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in under the Minority Affairs section before deadline.

title: Maulana Azad National Fellowship for Minority Students
description: Provides integrated five-year fellowships to minority students for pursuing M.Phil and Ph.D in universities and institutions recognized by UGC.
benefits: JRF: ₹31,000/month; SRF: ₹35,000/month plus HRA and contingency for 5 years.
application_process: Apply through the UGC or scholarships.gov.in under Maulana Azad National Fellowship.

title: SC/ST Hub Scheme
description: Supports SC/ST entrepreneurs in participating in public procurement through skill development, mentoring, and handholding assistance.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Business mentoring, udyam registration support, access to GeM portal, and MSME scheme handholding.
application_process: Register through msme.gov.in or NSIC SC/ST Hub portal for mentoring and scheme guidance.

title: Vanbandhu Kalyan Yojana
description: Holistic tribal development scheme covering education, health, livelihood, connectivity, and social infrastructure in tribal-dominated areas.
benefits: Convergence of multiple tribal welfare programs including education, health, road, water, and livelihood.
application_process: Benefits delivered through gram panchayat and block-level tribal welfare offices.

title: Ambedkar Social Innovation and Incubation Mission
description: Identifies SC student entrepreneurs and provides them technology business incubation, mentoring, seed funding, and market linkage support.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Up to ₹30 lakh seed funding, incubation support, mentorship, and market access for social enterprises.
application_process: Apply through ASIIM portal under the social justice ministry during open application cycle.

title: Dr. Ambedkar Scheme for Social Integration through Sports
description: Promotes social integration of SC communities by organizing inter-caste harmony sports events at village, district, and state levels.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Financial support for travel, training, and participation in sports events promoting social harmony.
application_process: Register through state social welfare department or district sports authority for organized events.

title: Self Employment Scheme for Rehabilitation of Manual Scavengers
description: Rehabilitates identified manual scavengers and their dependants by providing alternative livelihood, skill training, and one-time cash assistance.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: One-time cash assistance of ₹40,000; skill training; subsidized/concessional loans up to ₹15 lakh for alternative occupation.
application_process: Identified manual scavengers apply through NSKFDC or district SRMS implementation office.

title: National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities
description: Provides legal guardianship, shelter, rehabilitation, and caregiver training for persons with severe mental and neurological disabilities.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Legal guardianship under Local Level Committee, respite care, day care, group homes, and caregiver training.
application_process: Register with a National Trust registered organization or apply through nationaltrust.gov.in.

title: INSPIRE Scholarship Programme
description: Department of Science and Technology scheme to attract talented students to study science and pursue research careers with scholarships and mentoring.
benefits: ₹80,000/year for B.Sc. and M.Sc. students; SHE component for top 1% board students.
application_process: Apply through online-inspire.gov.in for SHE scholarship after qualifying in board exams.

title: State Level National Merit Scholarship
description: State-administered merit-based scholarships to recognize and support outstanding students at secondary and higher secondary level.
benefits: ₹500–₹1,000/month scholarship for continuing school education at secondary level.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in after merit selection by state education board.

title: Pradhan Mantri Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan
description: Makes one person per rural household digitally literate to access government services, conduct digital payments, and communicate online.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
benefits: Free 20-hour digital literacy training covering smartphones, internet, email, and digital payment skills.
application_process: Register through CSC or pmgdisha.in; priority given to SC/ST, minorities, BPL, and women.

title: Coaching for SC/ST Students for Competitive Exams
description: Provides free coaching for SC/ST candidates appearing in competitive exams like UPSC, SSC, Bank PO, JEE, NEET, and other professional entrance tests.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free coaching at empaneled coaching institutes; stipend of ₹3,000/month during coaching period.
application_process: Apply through socialjustice.gov.in or state social welfare department for empanelled coaching centre.

title: National Institute of Open Schooling Scholarship
description: Provides free learning and examination opportunities to students who cannot attend regular schools due to economic, social, or geographical reasons through open schooling.
benefits: Scholarships and fee waivers for SC/ST/disabled learners; flexible learning through distance mode.
application_process: Enroll at NIOS through its study centres or online portal at nios.ac.in.

title: Ishan Uday Special Scholarship Scheme for North East
description: Encourages students from North Eastern states to pursue degree-level education outside their home state for wider exposure and academic growth.
benefits: ₹5,400/month for general courses and ₹7,800/month for professional courses outside home state.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in during the announced scholarship period.

title: USTAD – Upgrading Skills and Training in Traditional Arts/Crafts for Development
description: Preserves rich heritage of traditional arts and crafts of minorities by upgrading skills and linking artisans to market opportunities.
benefits: Free skill training in traditional crafts, tool kit, stipend during training, and market linkage.
application_process: Apply through nearest minority welfare office or NGO implementing USTAD scheme in your area.

title: Skill India Mission
description: Umbrella mission to create a skilled workforce for industry needs by integrating skill development across all ministries and providing recognized certifications.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefits: Free or subsidized skill training across 40+ sectors with NSQF-aligned certification and placement support.
application_process: Register on skillindia.gov.in or visit nearest skill development centre or ITI.

title: Startup India Initiative
description: Flagship initiative to build a strong startup ecosystem by providing tax exemptions, regulatory support, funding access, and fast-track IP registration for recognized startups.
benefits: DPIIT recognition, 3-year tax holiday, fast-track IP registration at 80% rebate, self-certification of labour laws.
application_process: Register on startupindia.gov.in and apply for DPIIT recognition with company details.

title: Production Linked Incentive Scheme
description: Provides financial incentives to boost domestic manufacturing across 14 key sectors by incentivizing additional sales over a base year threshold.
benefits: 4–20% incentive on incremental sales over base year across eligible manufacturing sectors.
application_process: Apply through respective ministry (e.g., MeitY for electronics) during the open application window.

title: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises
description: Provides collateral-free credit guarantee to lending institutions against loans extended to micro and small enterprises to ease credit access.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Collateral-free business loans covered by government guarantee; loans up to ₹5 crore covered.
application_process: Apply for business loan at participating bank or NBFC; bank applies for CGTMSE guarantee.

title: Udyam Registration for MSMEs
description: Simplified online registration for Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises enabling access to government schemes, subsidies, priority sector lending, and procurement benefits.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Official MSME status, access to priority lending, government procurement preference, and scheme benefits.
application_process: Self-register on udyamregistration.gov.in with Aadhaar and PAN; no documents required to upload.

title: Technology Upgradation Fund Scheme for Textiles
description: Provides interest reimbursement and capital subsidy to textile and jute industries for technology upgradation, modernization, and energy conservation.
benefits: Interest reimbursement on term loans at 6% p.a.; capital subsidy of 15–25% for powerloom sector.
application_process: Apply through the Nodal Bank under TUFS or ministry of textiles portal.

title: Government e-Marketplace (GeM) Seller Registration
description: Online marketplace enabling sellers and service providers including MSMEs to sell directly to government buyers and reduce procurement costs.
benefits: Direct access to government procurement; preference for MSMEs, SC/ST, women-owned units; faster payment cycle.
application_process: Register as seller on gem.gov.in with business and bank details for government procurement.

title: Startup Intellectual Property Protection Scheme (SIPP)
description: Facilitates DPIIT-recognized startups to file patents, trademarks, and designs at significantly reduced fees with expert facilitator support.
benefits: 80% rebate on patent fees; 50% rebate on trademark fees; free facilitator services for IP filing.
application_process: File through empanelled IP facilitators or CGPDTM after getting DPIIT recognition.

title: NSIC Single Point Registration Scheme
description: Enables MSMEs to register with NSIC for government tenders, exemptions from earnest money deposit, and tender document fee waiver.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Waiver of EMD and tender fees; enhanced credibility for government procurement; access to NSIC schemes.
application_process: Apply through nsic.co.in for Single Point Registration with required financial and business documents.

title: ZED Certification Scheme for MSMEs
description: Promotes Zero Defect Zero Effect manufacturing practices among MSMEs to improve quality, reduce waste, and enhance global competitiveness.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Certification with preferential treatment in government procurement; 5–15% subsidy on certification cost for MSMEs.
application_process: Register and apply for ZED assessment at zed.org.in.

title: Micro and Small Enterprises Cluster Development Programme
description: Develops industrial clusters of MSMEs with shared infrastructure, technology upgradation, capacity building, and market development support.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Financial support up to ₹15 crore for common facility centres in clusters; diagnostic and training support.
application_process: Apply through MSME-DFO office or district industries centre as part of a registered cluster.

title: Pradhan Mantri Rojgar Protsahan Yojana
description: Government pays employers' EPF contribution (12%) for new employees to incentivize formal job creation for first-time workers.
benefits: Employer EPF contribution fully paid by government for 3 years for new formal employees earning under ₹15,000/month.
application_process: New employees register with employer on EPFO; employer avails PMRPY benefit at the portal.

title: Employees Provident Fund Scheme
description: Mandatory provident fund and pension scheme for organized sector employees ensuring long-term retirement savings and insurance security.
benefits: Provident fund corpus, pension under EPS, EDLI insurance of ₹7 lakh, and partial withdrawal for specific needs.
application_process: Automatic for establishments with 20+ employees; register UAN through employer on EPFO portal.

title: Employees State Insurance Scheme
description: Provides comprehensive social security benefits including medical, sickness, maternity, disability, and dependent benefits to workers in organized sector.
benefits: Full medical care for employee and family; sickness benefit at 70% wages; maternity benefit for 26 weeks; disability pension.
application_process: Employer registers establishment with ESIC; employee gets ESIC IP number and card automatically.

title: PM Laghu Vyapari Maan-Dhan Yojana
description: Voluntary pension scheme for small traders and shopkeepers providing assured minimum pension after age 60 with government contributing matching contribution.
benefits: ₹3,000/month pension after age 60; family pension to spouse on subscriber's death.
application_process: Enroll at nearest CSC with Aadhaar and select monthly contribution amount based on entry age.

title: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-Dhan
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers providing assured monthly pension of ₹3,000 after age 60 with government contributing equal amount.
benefits: ₹3,000/month pension after 60 years; family pension (₹1,500/month) if subscriber dies.
application_process: Enroll at nearest CSC with Aadhaar and auto-debit mandate; monthly premium as low as ₹55.

title: National Pension System
