description: Voluntary long-term retirement savings scheme regulated by PFRDA, open to all citizens with flexible investment choices and tax benefits under 80CCD.
benefits: Market-linked retirement corpus; tax deduction up to ₹2 lakh under 80C and 80CCD(1B); flexible withdrawal.
application_process: Open NPS account at Point of Presence bank, post office, or enroll online through eNPS at npstrust.org.in.

title: Payment of Gratuity Act
description: Statutory benefit requiring employers to pay gratuity to employees with 5+ years of continuous service on retirement, resignation, or death.
benefits: 15 days' wages per year of service; maximum gratuity ₹20 lakh tax-free on completion of 5+ years.
application_process: Apply to employer on Form I under the Gratuity Act on retirement or resignation after 5 years.

title: Prime Minister Employment Generation Programme
description: Credit-linked subsidy scheme to generate employment by setting up micro-enterprises in non-farm sectors through provision of bank credit and margin money subsidy.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: 15–35% margin money subsidy on project cost; loans up to ₹25 lakh for manufacturing and ₹10 lakh for service sector.
application_process: Apply through KVIC, Khadi Boards, DIC, or banks via the PMEGP e-portal.

title: Design Clinic Scheme for MSMEs
description: Promotes design consciousness and design capability among MSMEs by providing access to expert design consultants and funding for design projects.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Up to ₹60,000 for design seminars and ₹40 lakh for design projects with expert consultant support.
application_process: Apply through the National Design Research Forum or MSME portal with project proposal.

title: SIDBI Fund of Funds for Startups
description: Fund of Funds managed by SIDBI to invest in SEBI-registered Alternative Investment Funds (AIFs) that further invest in DPIIT-recognized startups.
benefits: Access to VC/PE funding through SIDBI-backed AIFs; corpus of ₹10,000 crore for startup investments.
application_process: Approach SEBI-registered AIFs backed by SIDBI FFS or apply through startupindia.gov.in.

title: New Gen Innovation and Entrepreneurship Development Centre
description: Promotes entrepreneurship culture and creation of student startups in educational institutions by setting up innovation and incubation infrastructure.
benefits: Seed fund, mentoring, incubation space, IP support, and market linkage for student entrepreneurs.
application_process: Apply through AICTE-approved college IEDCs or nearest technology business incubator.

title: Maharashtra Udyam Initiative (MUI)
description: State scheme to promote micro-enterprises in Maharashtra by providing financial assistance and handholding for new units set up by educated unemployed youth.
ministry: Industries, Energy and Labour Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Seed capital up to ₹1 lakh with 20% subsidy; DIC handholding and market linkage support.
application_process: Apply at District Industries Centre (DIC) or Udyog Mitra portal in Maharashtra.

title: Mukhyamantri Saur Krishi Pump Yojana (Maharashtra)
description: Maharashtra scheme providing solar agriculture pumps to farmers as an alternative to subsidized electricity connection for irrigation purposes.
benefits: Solar pump at 5–10% cost for general and free for SC/ST/landless farmers; 3–7.5 HP pump capacity.
application_process: Apply through agri.maharashtra.gov.in or District Agriculture Office under MSKPY.

title: Ramai Awas Gharkul Yojana (Maharashtra)
description: Maharashtra housing scheme for Scheduled Caste and Nav-Buddhist beneficiaries for construction of pucca houses in rural areas.
benefits: ₹1.30 lakh for house construction for SC/Nav-Buddhist families in rural Maharashtra.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or Aaple Sarkar portal; beneficiaries selected from SECC list.

title: Shasan Aplya Dari (Maharashtra)
description: Mobile camp service bringing government services to citizens' doorstep at Gram Panchayat level for applying to schemes, certificates, and documents.
benefits: On-the-spot issuance of government certificates, scheme enrollment, and document services at village level.
documents: Relevant documents as per service required
application_process: Attend Shasan Aplya Dari camp organized at Gram Panchayat level on scheduled dates.

title: Maharashtra Employment Guarantee Scheme
description: Maharashtra's own employment guarantee scheme providing additional wage employment to rural poor beyond MGNREGS for creation of productive community assets.
benefits: Wage employment for rural households beyond MGNREGS entitlement; rate tied to state minimum wage.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat office by submitting demand for work under MEGS.

title: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Jan Arogya Yojana
description: Maharashtra's state health insurance scheme providing cashless treatment for BPL and APL families at empanelled hospitals for 971 listed illnesses.
benefits: Cashless hospitalization up to ₹1.5 lakh per family per year for 971 diseases including critical illnesses.
application_process: Register at nearest empanelled hospital with ration card and Aadhaar for cashless treatment.

title: Baliraja Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Shetkari Sanman Yojana
description: Maharashtra scheme for one-time conditional waiver of overdue crop loans for eligible farmers who faced severe drought and crop failure.
benefits: Conditional loan waiver up to ₹1.5 lakh on crop loans for drought-affected eligible farmers.
application_process: Apply through cooperative bank or district collector office during the announced application period.

title: Maharashtra State Scholarship for Minority Students
description: State-level scholarship for minority community students at pre-matric and post-matric levels in Maharashtra to prevent dropout and promote higher education.
benefits: ₹500–₹2,000/month maintenance allowance plus tuition fee reimbursement for minority students.
application_process: Apply through mahaeschol.in or MahaDBT portal under minority development department.

title: Magel Tyala Shet Talay Yojana (Maharashtra)
description: Maharashtra scheme to construct farm ponds on demand for farmers to conserve rainwater for irrigation and increase water availability during dry spells.
benefits: 100% government-funded farm pond construction on eligible farm land with technical support.
application_process: Apply through agriculture office or Aaple Sarkar portal for farm pond sanction under MTSY.

title: Maharashtra Economically Weaker Section Certificate
description: EWS certificate issued to eligible candidates from the open/general category in Maharashtra for availing 10% reservation in jobs and education.
benefits: 10% reservation in government jobs and educational institutions for EWS category candidates.
application_process: Apply at nearest Aaple Sarkar service centre or Tahsildar office for EWS certificate.

title: Sanjay Gandhi Niradhar Anudan Yojana (Maharashtra)
description: Maharashtra social security scheme providing monthly financial assistance to destitute persons including orphans, widows, abandoned women, and persons with disabilities.
benefits: ₹600–₹900/month financial assistance directly transferred to bank account of destitute beneficiaries.
application_process: Apply at Gram Panchayat, Municipal Office, or Aaple Sarkar portal with supporting documents.

title: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (Maharashtra Implementation)
description: Monthly pension to BPL widows between ages 40–79 years under the IGWPS as implemented by Maharashtra state social justice department.
benefits: ₹600/month (₹300 central + ₹300 state) pension for BPL widows.
application_process: Apply at Gram Panchayat, Ward Office, or Aaple Sarkar portal for widow pension.

title: Dr. Panjabrao Deshmukh Vasatigruha Maintenance Allowance Scheme
description: Maharashtra provides maintenance allowance to SC students staying in government or private hostels to support continuation of higher education.
benefits: Monthly maintenance allowance for SC hostel students covering boarding and lodging costs.
application_process: Apply through mahaeschol.in or college hostel under Social Justice Department Maharashtra.

title: Maharashtra Handloom and Textile Weaver Support Scheme
description: Provides financial assistance, tools, market access, and design support to handloom weavers in Maharashtra for promoting traditional textile crafts.
benefits: Tool kit, yarn at subsidized rate, design training, and market linkage through state handloom corporations.
application_process: Register at nearest District Handloom Office or Maharashtra Rajya Hasthakala Vikas Corporation.

title: Maharashtra Divyangjan Viklang Sahay Yojana
description: Maharashtra provides assistive devices, wheelchairs, and crutches to persons with disabilities free of cost through district-level camps and rehabilitation centres.
benefits: Free wheelchairs, hearing aids, crutches, callipers, and other aids at government distribution camps.
application_process: Apply at district social welfare office or attend ALIMCO/state disability device camps in Maharashtra.

title: Maha Seva (Aaple Sarkar) Portal Services
description: Maharashtra government's unified online portal delivering 500+ government certificates and services to citizens including caste, income, domicile, and property certificates.
benefits: Online delivery of government certificates like caste, income, domicile within guaranteed time frames.
documents: Supporting Documents as per certificate type
application_process: Apply at aaplesarkar.mahaonline.gov.in or nearest Aaple Sarkar service centre.

title: Mahatma Phule Shetkari Karj Mukti Yojana
description: Maharashtra loan waiver scheme for short-term crop loans of farmers to provide relief to distressed farmers during agrarian crisis situations.
benefits: Conditional loan waiver of short-term overdue crop loans up to ₹2 lakh for eligible farmers.
application_process: Apply through cooperative bank or district agriculture office during the scheme window.

title: Maharashtra Women Entrepreneurship Scheme (Stree Shakti Udyog Prerana)
description: State scheme to encourage women entrepreneurs in Maharashtra by providing subsidized loans, skill training, and enterprise development support.
benefits: Seed capital assistance, training, 25% capital subsidy on project cost up to ₹5 lakh for women-owned enterprises.
application_process: Apply at District Industries Centre or Udyog Mitra portal in Maharashtra.

title: Shravan Bal Seva Rajya Nivritti Vetan Yojana (Maharashtra)
description: Monthly pension for senior citizens above 65 years from economically weaker sections in Maharashtra who are not covered by any other pension scheme.
benefits: ₹600/month pension for senior citizens above 65 years not receiving any other pension.
application_process: Apply at Gram Panchayat, Ward Office, or Aaple Sarkar portal with age and income certificate.

title: Maharashtra Annadoot Scheme
description: Maharashtra scheme providing subsidized meals at ₹10 per plate through Shiv Bhojan Thali to urban poor, laborers, and migrant workers via canteens.
ministry: Food and Drug Administration Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Full nutritious meal (2 chapatis, vegetable, rice, dal) at ₹10 per plate at Shiv Bhojan canteens.
documents: Aadhaar Card or any ID (if required)
application_process: Visit nearest Shiv Bhojan Thali canteen; meals available without prior registration.

title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Vikas Karyakram
description: Infrastructure development scheme in minority concentrated areas covering education, health, skills, and roads to improve socio-economic conditions of minority communities.
benefits: Community infrastructure like schools, ITIs, degree colleges, hospitals, and connectivity in minority areas.
application_process: Schemes implemented through state and UT governments in identified minority concentrated blocks.

title: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Rojgar Yojana
description: Emergency employment scheme for returning migrant workers providing 125 days of work across 25 government works in 116 identified rural districts.
benefits: 125 days of wage employment at minimum wage in identified districts for returning migrants.
application_process: Register at Gram Panchayat with MGNREGS job card in identified 116 districts.

title: Industrial Park Scheme for Export Promotion
description: Develops industrial parks with world-class infrastructure for export-oriented units to boost India's manufacturing exports and attract FDI.
benefits: Developed industrial plots, plug-and-play infrastructure, and export promotion support at competitive rates.
application_process: Apply through DPIIT or state industrial development corporations for allotment in notified parks.

title: Khadi and Village Industries Scheme
description: Promotes khadi and village industries through financial assistance, marketing support, and skill development for rural artisans and weavers.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefits: Subsidized raw material, interest subsidy, KVIC rebate scheme benefits, and market linkage support.
application_process: Register at nearest KVIC or Khadi Board office for training, certification, and scheme benefits.

title: Maharashtra Child Labour Elimination Scheme
description: Maharashtra scheme to rehabilitate rescued child laborers by providing bridge education, vocational training, and linking families to social protection schemes.
benefits: Bridge schooling, vocational training for parents, and family linkage to social security and welfare schemes.
application_process: Rescued children are enrolled by Child Labour Rehabilitation Centres under the Labour Department.

title: Maharashtra Startup Policy 2023
description: Maharashtra's comprehensive startup policy providing funding, mentoring, tax incentives, and ease of doing business measures to foster a vibrant startup ecosystem.
benefits: Seed fund up to ₹25 lakh, incubation space, tax exemption, mentoring, and fast-track clearances.
application_process: Apply through mahasmartportal.maharashtra.gov.in or via registered incubators under the policy.

title: Pavitra Paryavaran Scheme (Maharashtra Waste to Energy)
description: Maharashtra initiative for processing municipal solid waste and generating energy through waste-to-energy plants at urban local body level.
ministry: Environment and Climate Change Department, Maharashtra
benefits: Tipping fee and power purchase support for waste-to-energy project developers; ULB procurement guarantee.
application_process: Submit project proposal to Maharashtra Pollution Control Board or concerned ULB.

title: Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act – Reservation and Benefits
description: Guarantees 5% reservation in government jobs and 5% in higher education for persons with benchmark disabilities under the RPWD Act 2016.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: 5% job reservation, 5% educational reservation, concessions in transport, priority in housing allocation.
application_process: Obtain UDID card from swavlambancard.gov.in; quote disability status in job/admission applications.

title: Drishti – Corneal Transplant Assistance Scheme
description: Provides financial assistance to persons with visual impairment from poor backgrounds for corneal transplant surgery to restore sight.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹40,000 for corneal transplant surgery at empanelled hospitals.
application_process: Apply through NHFDC state channelizing agencies or district disability rehabilitation centre.

title: Saksham Scholarship for Divyangjan Students
description: Merit-based scholarship for students with disabilities pursuing technical education at diploma and degree levels in AICTE-approved institutions.
benefits: ₹30,000/year for diploma students and ₹50,000/year for degree students with disabilities.
application_process: Apply through the AICTE portal at scholarships.gov.in during the open application cycle.

title: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension for BPL persons with severe or multiple disabilities aged 18 to 79 years under the National Social Assistance Programme.
benefits: ₹300/month pension for BPL persons with 80%+ disability or multiple disabilities.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office under NSAP.

title: SMART – Scheme for Assistance to Disabled Persons for Purchase of Aids
description: Provides high-end assistive devices and smart rehabilitation aids such as motorized wheelchairs and smart canes to persons with disabilities.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Subsidized high-end assistive devices including motorized wheelchairs, smart canes, and hearing aids.
application_process: Apply through ALIMCO or at district disability rehabilitation camps under the SMART scheme.

title: Vishwas Rehabilitation Centres for Disabled
description: Establishes community-based rehabilitation centres in border, hilly, and remote areas to deliver disability services closer to underserved populations.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free physiotherapy, speech therapy, early intervention, and disability assessment at community centres.
application_process: Visit nearest Vishwas Community-Based Rehabilitation Centre in your district.

title: National Mental Health Programme
description: Provides accessible community-based mental health care services through District Mental Health Programme units across all districts in India.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Free outpatient psychiatric care, medicines, counseling, and referral through district hospitals.
application_process: Visit District Mental Health Programme unit at district hospital for free consultation and medicines.

title: Railway Concession for Persons with Disabilities
description: Indian Railways provides fare concessions ranging from 25% to 75% to persons with benchmark disabilities and their escorts for all classes of travel.
benefits: 25–75% concession on train fares for all classes; escort concession for severely disabled persons.
application_process: Present UDID card or disability certificate at railway booking counter or enter details in online booking.

title: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension to BPL senior citizens aged 60 years and above under the National Social Assistance Programme.
benefits: ₹200/month for ages 60–79 and ₹500/month for ages 80 and above under IGNOAPS.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office under the NSAP scheme.

title: Senior Citizens Savings Scheme
description: High-interest savings scheme exclusively for senior citizens aged 60 and above offering the highest guaranteed returns among small savings instruments.
benefits: 8.2% per annum interest; up to ₹30 lakh investment; quarterly interest payout; tax benefit under 80C.
application_process: Open SCSS account at post office or designated bank branch with age proof and deposit amount.

title: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana
description: Pension plan for senior citizens guaranteeing assured return of 7.4% p.a. with monthly pension for 10 years, managed by LIC of India.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹1,000–₹9,250 for 10 years; purchase price returned to nominee after 10 years or death.
application_process: Purchase PMVVY policy through LIC branches or LIC online portal with lump sum investment.

title: National Programme for Health Care of the Elderly
description: Provides dedicated health care for persons above 60 years including geriatric OPD, IPD, day care, and home-based care at district and sub-district level.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Free geriatric OPD, dedicated IPD beds, physiotherapy, home-based care, and elder helpline at government hospitals.
application_process: Visit dedicated geriatric OPD at district or medical college hospital under NPHCE.

title: Elderline – National Helpline for Senior Citizens
description: Toll-free national helpline (14567) for senior citizens providing information, guidance, emotional support, field intervention, and referral services.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free 24x7 helpline for abuse reporting, emotional support, legal guidance, and referral to elder care services.
application_process: Call 14567 for immediate assistance; operates across states in multiple languages.

title: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana
description: Provides free assistive living devices such as walking sticks, wheelchairs, hearing aids, and spectacles to BPL senior citizens suffering from age-related disabilities.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free walking frames, wheelchairs, artificial dentures, hearing aids, spectacles, and tripods for BPL elderly.
application_process: Attend ALIMCO distribution camps for senior citizens organized by Social Justice Department.

title: Maintenance and Welfare of Parents and Senior Citizens Act
description: Entitles senior citizens and parents to claim maintenance from children and relatives through fast-track tribunals for basic living needs and medical expenses.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Legal right to claim maintenance up to ₹10,000/month from children; return of property transferred under duress.
application_process: File application at Maintenance Tribunal (Sub-Divisional Magistrate level) in your district.

title: Integrated Programme for Senior Citizens
description: Provides financial support to state governments and NGOs for running old age homes, multi-service centres, and mobile Medicare units for senior citizens.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Subsidized or free shelter, food, medical care, and recreational facilities at old age homes run under IPSrC.
application_process: Apply at nearest old age home funded under IPSrC through state social welfare department.

title: SACRED Portal for Senior Citizens Employment
description: Online marketplace connecting senior citizens above 60 with employment and self-employment opportunities leveraging their experience and skills.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Job matching platform for senior citizens; access to part-time, full-time, and freelance opportunities.
application_process: Register on sacred.dosje.gov.in with profile details and preferred sector or work type.

title: Hunar Haat Scheme
description: Creates market access and platform for traditional artisans from minority communities by organizing exhibitions across India and connecting to premium buyers.
benefits: Free stall space at Hunar Haat events; national and international market exposure for traditional crafts.
application_process: Apply through the Ministry of Minority Affairs or registered NGO for participation in upcoming Hunar Haat.

title: Seekho Aur Kamao Scheme
description: Skill development scheme for minority communities to upgrade traditional skills and create employment through placement-linked vocational training.
benefits: Free skill training in traditional and modern trades; stipend of ₹750–₹1,500/month; placement assistance.
application_process: Apply through NGO or agency implementing Seekho Aur Kamao in your district.

title: Hamari Dharohar Scheme
description: Preserves the rich heritage of minority communities of India by supporting documentation of manuscripts, heritage, and cultural practices.
benefits: Grant support for heritage documentation, museum exhibitions, manuscript digitization, and cultural events.
application_process: Apply through the Ministry of Minority Affairs with a heritage or cultural documentation project proposal.

title: Waqf Property Development Scheme
description: Develops and upgrades Waqf properties for commercial use to generate revenue for Muslim minority welfare and community development activities.
benefits: Commercial development of Waqf properties generating revenue for minority community welfare funds.
application_process: Apply through respective State Waqf Board for property development project approvals.

title: Free Coaching for Minority Students for Competitive Exams
description: Provides free coaching to minority community students for central and state government competitive examinations including UPSC, SSC, NEET, and JEE.
benefits: Free coaching at empanelled institutes; stipend of ₹3,000/month during coaching period.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in or the Ministry of Minority Affairs portal for empanelled coaching centres.

title: Jiyo Parsi Scheme
description: Scheme to arrest the declining population of Parsis in India by providing financial assistance for medical treatment including fertility treatment to Parsi couples.
benefits: Financial assistance for fertility treatment, medical support during pregnancy, and child care expenses.
application_process: Apply through Parzor Foundation or the Ministry of Minority Affairs under the Jiyo Parsi scheme.

title: PM DAKSH – Skill Development for Transgender Persons
description: Provides free placement-linked skill training to transgender persons to improve their employability and economic independence.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free skill training, stipend during training, placement assistance, and post-placement support for transgender persons.
application_process: Apply through pmdaksh.dosje.gov.in or contact state social welfare department for scheme enrollment.

title: Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Act – Identity Certificate
description: Provides legal identity to transgender persons through a Transgender Identity Certificate issued by the District Magistrate to avail all government rights and entitlements.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Legal identity certificate, protection from discrimination, right to education, employment, and healthcare as transgender person.
application_process: Apply through the TGID portal at transgender.dosje.gov.in or District Magistrate office.

title: Garima Greh – Shelter Home for Transgender Persons
description: Provides safe shelter with food, clothing, recreational facilities, skill development, and counseling to destitute transgender persons.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free shelter, three meals daily, clothing, counseling, legal aid, skill training, and medical care.
application_process: Contact nearest Garima Greh shelter home or reach district social welfare office for referral.

title: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization
description: Promotes farm mechanization among small and marginal farmers by providing subsidized agricultural equipment and custom hiring centres.
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: 40–50% subsidy on farm equipment for small/marginal farmers; up to 80% for SC/ST/women.
application_process: Apply through agrimachinery.nic.in or state agriculture department for equipment subsidy.

title: National Trust – Samarth Scheme for Disabled Persons
description: Provides caregiver training and respite care services to families of persons with autism, cerebral palsy, intellectual disabilities, and multiple disabilities.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free caregiver training, respite care, home-based therapy support, and crisis management for families.
application_process: Register through a National Trust registered organization at nationaltrust.gov.in.

title: Income Tax Benefits for Persons with Disabilities
description: Provides income tax deduction under Section 80U for persons with disabilities and Section 80DD for those who maintain a dependent with disability.
benefits: ₹75,000 deduction under 80U (₹1.25 lakh for severe disability); ₹75,000 under 80DD for dependant.
application_process: Claim deduction while filing Income Tax Return at incometax.gov.in using 80U or 80DD provision.

title: Sugamya Bharat App for Accessibility Information
description: Mobile application to crowdsource and report accessibility status of public buildings, transport hubs, and utilities to create an accessible India for persons with disabilities.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Platform to report accessibility barriers; facilitates government response to accessibility complaints.
application_process: Download Sugamya Bharat app from Play Store or App Store to report and track accessibility issues.

title: Niramaya – Health Insurance Scheme for Persons with Disabilities
description: Affordable health insurance scheme for persons with autism, cerebral palsy, intellectual disabilities, and multiple disabilities through the National Trust.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Health cover up to ₹1 lakh per year at premium of ₹250 (BPL: ₹50); covers OPD, IPD, dental, and therapy.
application_process: Enroll through National Trust registered organizations or at nationaltrust.gov.in.

title: Varishtha Nagrik Tirth Yatra Scheme
description: State and central schemes providing free or subsidized pilgrimage tours to BPL senior citizens to prominent religious sites across India.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free or subsidized rail/air pilgrimage to religious sites; includes travel, accommodation, and meals.
application_process: Apply through district social welfare office or IRCTC for senior citizen pilgrimage schemes.

title: Maulana Azad Education Foundation Grant
description: Provides educational grants to minority girls for pursuing higher education and supports construction of school buildings for minority communities.
benefits: Educational grant up to ₹10,000 for minority girls in Classes 6 to 12 and ₹25,000 for higher education.
application_process: Apply through the Maulana Azad Education Foundation website or district minority welfare office.

title: Vocational Rehabilitation Centres for Persons with Disabilities
description: Provides free vocational assessment, training, and placement support to persons with disabilities at Vocational Rehabilitation Centres across India.
benefits: Free vocational assessment, training in multiple trades, placement assistance, and job fair access.
application_process: Apply at nearest VRC under the Directorate General of Employment (DGE) in your state.

title: Vidya Lakshmi for Transgender Students
description: Ensures access to educational loans and scholarships for transgender students pursuing higher education by eliminating gender-based discrimination in financial aid.
benefits: Education loans without gender discrimination; scholarships under existing central and state schemes.
application_process: Apply through vidyalakshmi.co.in or scholarships.gov.in with transgender identity certificate.

title: Ayushman Bharat for Transgender Persons
description: Extends PM-JAY health coverage to all transgender persons in India with special provisions for gender affirming care and mental health services.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Cashless health coverage up to ₹5 lakh; inclusion of gender affirming procedures under PMJAY.
application_process: Apply at nearest empanelled hospital with transgender identity certificate or check pmjay.gov.in.

title: Varishtha Pension Bima Yojana
description: LIC-managed pension scheme for senior citizens aged 60+ offering guaranteed pension income by paying a lump sum premium with government-backed returns.
benefits: Guaranteed pension at 9.3% return on investment; monthly, quarterly, half-yearly, or annual payout.
application_process: Purchase VPBY policy through LIC branches or LIC agents with lump sum payment.

title: Scheme for Hostels for Minority Girls
description: Funds construction of hostels for minority girl students studying in secondary schools and colleges who are from rural or semi-urban areas.
benefits: Subsidized hostel accommodation near school or college with basic amenities for minority girl students.
application_process: Apply through state minority development department or institution running the minority hostel.

title: Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Scheme
description: Provides social security benefits including pension, accident insurance, housing loan, education, and medical assistance to registered construction workers.
benefits: Death/disability compensation, pension, housing loan, children's education assistance, and medical reimbursement.
documents: Proof of 90 days' construction work in preceding year
application_process: Register with the State Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board to get Labour Card.

title: National Commission for Minorities – Grievance Redressal
description: Minority community members can file grievances and complaints related to discrimination, rights violations, and service denials with the National Commission for Minorities.
benefits: Free grievance resolution, inquiry into rights violations, and recommendations to government agencies.
application_process: File complaint online at ncm.nic.in or by post to the National Commission for Minorities.

title: Central Waqf Council – Welfare Activities
description: Funds welfare and educational activities for Muslim minority community through grants to state Waqf Boards including schools, medical camps, and community centres.
benefits: Community infrastructure, scholarships, medical camps, and legal aid funded through Waqf council grants.
application_process: Access services provided by state Waqf Board-funded institutions and community centres.

title: Divyang Sarathi App for Persons with Disabilities
description: Mobile application providing information on all disability schemes, UDID application status, scheme benefits, and nearest rehabilitation centres.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Free mobile app giving access to disability scheme information, UDID status, and nearest service centre.
application_process: Download Divyang Sarathi app from Google Play Store or Apple App Store.

title: Senior Citizen Railway Travel Concession
description: Indian Railways provides 40% fare concession to male senior citizens above 60 years and 50% to female senior citizens above 58 years on all classes.
benefits: 40% fare concession for men 60+ and 50% for women 58+ on all rail classes including Rajdhani and Shatabdi.
application_process: Provide age proof at booking counter or enter date of birth in online booking to claim concession.

title: National Portal for Transgender Persons
description: Online portal for transgender persons to apply for identity certificates, access welfare schemes, and find registered service providers and NGOs.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Identity certificate, scheme discovery, grievance filing, and directory of transgender service providers.
application_process: Register and apply at transgender.dosje.gov.in for identity certificate and scheme access.

title: Maulana Azad Education Foundation – Educational Infrastructure
description: Provides grants for construction and improvement of educational infrastructure in minority concentrated areas including classrooms, labs, and libraries.
benefits: Grants for construction of classrooms, toilets, science labs in minority-area schools and colleges.
application_process: Schools and colleges in minority areas apply through MAEF at maef.nic.in for infrastructure grants.

title: SMILE – Support for Marginalised Individuals for Livelihood and Enterprise
description: Comprehensive central sector scheme for welfare of transgender persons and persons engaged in begging, covering rehabilitation, education, skill, and livelihood.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: PM-JAY health insurance, PMJDY bank account, Ayushman card, skill training, and livelihood support.
application_process: Contact nearest Garima Greh or district social welfare office for SMILE scheme enrollment.

title: Central Government Health Scheme
description: Comprehensive health care including OPD, IPD, specialist consultation, medicines, and diagnostic tests to central government employees, pensioners, and their dependants.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: Cashless OPD, IPD, specialist care, medicines, diagnostic tests at CGHS wellness centres and empanelled hospitals.
application_process: Register through cghs.gov.in or nearest CGHS wellness centre with service or pension documents.

title: Pre-Matric and Post-Matric Scholarship for Transgender Students
description: Central scholarship for transgender students from economically weak backgrounds to prevent dropout and encourage continuation of school and college education.
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: Maintenance allowance and course fee reimbursement for transgender students at pre and post-matric level.
application_process: Apply through scholarships.gov.in under Social Justice Ministry scholarship section.

title: Mukhyamantri Kanya Sumangala Yojana (UP)
description: Uttar Pradesh scheme providing financial incentives at six key milestones in a girl child's life from birth to graduation to promote education and welfare of girls.
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Uttar Pradesh
benefits: ₹2,000 at birth, ₹1,000 at vaccination, ₹2,000 at Class 1, ₹2,000 at Class 6, ₹3,000 at Class 9, ₹5,000 at graduation.
application_process: Apply on mksy.up.gov.in or at ICDS/Anganwadi office in Uttar Pradesh.

title: UP Mukhyamantri Pension Yojana
description: Monthly pension for old age persons, widows, and disabled persons in Uttar Pradesh from economically weaker sections.
benefits: ₹1,000/month pension for elderly, widows, and disabled persons from BPL families in UP.
documents: Age Proof / Death Certificate of Husband
application_process: Apply on sspy-up.gov.in or at district social welfare office in Uttar Pradesh.

title: UP Kisan Karj Rahat Yojana
description: Uttar Pradesh government scheme providing one-time waiver of short-term crop loans for small and marginal farmers to relieve agrarian distress.
benefits: One-time farm loan waiver up to ₹1 lakh for eligible small and marginal farmers.
application_process: Apply on upkisankarjrahat.upsdc.gov.in or at district cooperative bank.

title: Mukhyamantri Gramin Awas Yojana (UP)
description: Uttar Pradesh state housing scheme providing financial assistance to landless rural poor who are not covered under PM Awaas Yojana-Gramin.
benefits: ₹1.20 lakh for house construction for rural homeless families not covered under PMAY-G.
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or district Rural Development office in Uttar Pradesh.

title: UP Free Laptop Distribution Scheme
description: Provides free laptops to meritorious students who have passed Class 10 and Class 12 from government schools to promote digital education.
benefits: Free laptop for meritorious Class 10 and 12 students from UP government schools.
application_process: Register on upcmo.up.nic.in; merit list published by UP secondary education board.

title: UP One Nation One Ration Card Scheme
description: Provides portable ration card facility to migrant workers in Uttar Pradesh enabling them to access subsidized food grains from any FPS in India.
ministry: Food and Civil Supplies Department, Uttar Pradesh
benefits: Portability of ration entitlement; subsidized food grains at any FPS in India with Aadhaar authentication.
application_process: Existing ration card holders can access any FPS; apply for new card at fcs.up.gov.in.

title: Mukhyamantri Yuva Swarozgar Yojana (UP)
description: Provides concessional loans and margin money subsidy to educated unemployed youth of UP for setting up micro and small enterprises in manufacturing and service sectors.
benefits: Loans up to ₹25 lakh (manufacturing) and ₹10 lakh (service); 25% margin money subsidy.
application_process: Apply on diupmsme.upsdc.gov.in or at District Industries Centre in UP.

title: Rajasthan Jan Aadhar Scheme
description: Unique family ID card for Rajasthan residents enabling access to 56+ government schemes and services including banking, insurance, and ration under single registration.
benefits: Single ID card for accessing 56+ state government schemes, DBT payments, and financial services.
application_process: Apply at Jan Aadhar enrollment centre, e-Mitra kiosk, or janadhar.rajasthan.gov.in.

title: Mukhyamantri Chiranjeevi Swasthya Bima Yojana (Rajasthan)
description: Provides universal health insurance coverage of ₹25 lakh per family per year to all Rajasthan residents at a minimal annual premium.
benefits: Cashless health cover of ₹25 lakh per family per year at empanelled hospitals; free for BPL/NFSA families.
application_process: Register on chiranjeevi.rajasthan.gov.in or at nearest e-Mitra kiosk with Jan Aadhar card.

title: Palanhar Yojana (Rajasthan)
description: Provides monthly financial assistance to families or guardians raising orphan and destitute children in Rajasthan in a family-like environment instead of institutionalizing them.
benefits: ₹500/month for 0–6 years and ₹1,000/month for 6–18 years; ₹2,000/year for clothing and other needs.
application_process: Apply at district social welfare office or SDMC in Rajasthan with required certificates.

title: Rajasthan Kisan Karj Mafi Yojana
description: One-time agricultural loan waiver scheme for small and marginal farmers of Rajasthan to relieve agrarian distress and reduce farmer indebtedness.
benefits: Crop loan waiver up to ₹2 lakh for eligible small and marginal farmers in Rajasthan.
application_process: Apply through cooperative bank or ksankalp.rajasthan.gov.in during scheme window.

title: Rajasthan Free Electricity Scheme for Farmers
description: Provides free electricity to agricultural pump connections for scheduled caste and small/marginal farmers in Rajasthan for irrigation.
benefits: Free agricultural electricity for pump connections up to 5 HP for SC/ST and small/marginal farmers.
application_process: Apply through JVVNL/AVVNL/JdVVNL electricity distribution company in Rajasthan.

title: Mukhyamantri Nishulk Dawa Evam Janch Yojana (Rajasthan)
description: Provides free essential medicines and diagnostic tests to all patients visiting government hospitals and health centres in Rajasthan.
benefits: Free medicines from essential drug list and free diagnostic tests at all government hospitals in Rajasthan.
application_process: Visit nearest government hospital or PHC in Rajasthan for free medicines and tests.

title: i-Khedut Portal – Gujarat Farmer Schemes
description: Unified online portal for Gujarat farmers to apply for agricultural subsidies, equipment, seeds, irrigation, and animal husbandry schemes.
benefits: Subsidy on seeds, fertilizers, farm equipment, irrigation, and animal husbandry inputs through single portal.
application_process: Apply on ikhedut.gujarat.gov.in for any agricultural scheme; select scheme and fill online form.

title: MA – Mukhyamantri Amrutam Vatsalya Yojana (Gujarat)
description: Provides cashless treatment for critical illnesses including cancer, heart disease, and kidney failure to BPL and lower middle-class families in Gujarat.
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for 2,000+ procedures at empanelled hospitals.
application_process: Apply on magujarat.gov.in or at empanelled hospital in Gujarat with Ration card and Aadhaar.

title: Kisan Suryoday Yojana (Gujarat)
description: Provides agricultural power supply to farmers of Gujarat during daytime (5 AM to 9 PM) to enable daytime irrigation and reduce crop losses.
benefits: Daytime agricultural electricity at normal tariff; reduced crop loss and better irrigation management.
application_process: Apply through GEB or DGVCL/UGVCL/PGVCL/MGVCL electricity distribution companies in Gujarat.

title: Gujarat Self-Employment Scheme for Educated Unemployed Youth
description: Provides bank loans with government subsidy to educated unemployed youth in Gujarat for setting up micro and small enterprises.
benefits: Loans up to ₹25 lakh for manufacturing and ₹10 lakh for service sector with 20–25% government subsidy.
application_process: Apply through District Industries Centre (DIC) in Gujarat or industries.gujarat.gov.in.

title: Namo Saraswati Science Scholarship (Gujarat)
description: Gujarat state scholarship for girls studying Science stream in Class 11 and 12 at government schools to encourage science education among girls.
benefits: ₹10,000 annually for Class 11 and ₹15,000 for Class 12 science students in Gujarat government schools.
application_process: Apply through school or e-Samaj Kalyan portal after admission to Science stream in Class 11.

title: Chief Minister Apprenticeship Learning Scheme (Gujarat)
description: Provides apprenticeship opportunities to ITI and diploma graduates in Gujarat industries with government stipend support for on-the-job skill building.
benefits: Monthly stipend during apprenticeship; recognized experience certificate and potential job offer.
application_process: Register on NAPS portal or contact Director of Employment and Training, Gujarat.

title: SWAGAT Online Grievance Redressal System (Gujarat)
description: Gujarat's online grievance redressal platform enabling citizens to submit complaints directly to the Chief Minister's office for prompt resolution.
benefits: Transparent and time-bound grievance resolution directly through Chief Minister's office.
application_process: File grievance at swagat.gujarat.gov.in or attend monthly SWAGAT programme.

title: Ladli Scheme (Delhi)
description: Delhi government scheme providing financial assistance to girl children from birth to Class 12 to arrest adverse child sex ratio and promote girl education.
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Delhi
benefits: ₹11,000 at birth (hospital/home), ₹10,000 at Class 1, Class 6, Class 9, and Class 10 each.
application_process: Apply through school or District Social Welfare Office or wcddel.in.

title: Mukhyamantri Tirth Yatra Yojana (Delhi)
description: Free pilgrimage scheme by Delhi government for senior citizens above 60 years to religious destinations by train with hospitality and escort.
benefits: Free train pilgrimage to religious sites including Ayodhya, Mathura, Shirdi, and Varanasi with full hospitality.
documents: Delhi Voter ID or Domicile Certificate
application_process: Apply online at edistrict.delhigovt.nic.in or at sub-divisional magistrate office.

title: Doorstep Delivery of Services Scheme (Delhi)
description: Delhi government service delivering 100+ government certificates and services to citizens' homes through mobile sahayaks for a nominal fee.
benefits: Doorstep delivery of income, caste, domicile, marriage, driving licence, and 100+ other certificates.
application_process: Call 1076 to book a mobile sahayak appointment for home delivery of government services.

title: Delhi Free Electricity Scheme
description: Provides zero electricity bills to Delhi households consuming up to 200 units per month and 50% subsidy on consumption up to 400 units.
benefits: Zero electricity bill up to 200 units/month; 50% subsidy (max ₹800) for consumption up to 400 units.
application_process: Automatically applied to eligible Delhi households by BSES/Tata Power; opt-in required via app.

title: Aam Aadmi Mohalla Clinic (Delhi)
description: Neighbourhood primary health care centres in Delhi providing free OPD consultations, 212 medicines, 38 diagnostic tests, and specialist referrals to all residents.
benefits: Free doctor consultation, 212 medicines, 38 diagnostic tests at walk-in neighbourhood clinics.
application_process: Walk into nearest Aam Aadmi Mohalla Clinic in Delhi; no appointment required.

title: Free DTC Bus Travel for Women (Delhi)
description: Delhi government scheme providing free travel on all DTC and cluster buses for all women passengers to enhance women's mobility and safety.
benefits: Free travel on all DTC and cluster bus routes in Delhi for all women passengers.
application_process: Obtain free pink ticket or Saarthi app QR code from bus conductor or DTC app.

title: Dr. Ambedkar Medhavi Chhatra Puraskar Yojana (Delhi)
description: Merit-based scholarship for SC/ST students in Delhi who score above 60% in Class 10 and 12 board exams for continuation of education.
benefits: ₹5,000 for Class 10 students and ₹10,000 for Class 12 students scoring above 60%.
application_process: Apply through Delhi SC/ST Welfare Department or scstwelfare.delhi.gov.in.

title: Delhi Free Water Supply Scheme
description: Delhi government provides 20 kilo litres of free water per month to all metered domestic connections registered with Delhi Jal Board.
benefits: 20 KL free water per month for domestic metered connections; nominal rate for usage above 20 KL.
application_process: Automatic for all metered domestic connections under Delhi Jal Board; register at djb.gov.in.

title: UP Pre-Matric Scholarship for General Category Students
description: Uttar Pradesh state scholarship for general category students from economically weaker families studying in Classes 9 and 10.
benefits: ₹150/month maintenance allowance and annual grant for textbooks and stationery.
application_process: Apply on scholarship.up.gov.in during the academic year enrollment window.

title: Gargi Puraskar Scheme (Rajasthan)
description: Rajasthan government awards to recognize and encourage girls who score more than 75% in Class 10 and 12 board exams and continue education.
benefits: ₹3,000 award for Class 10 and ₹5,000 for Class 12 girls scoring 75%+ and continuing education.
application_process: Apply on rajshaladarpan.nic.in or at nearest school during Basant Panchami distribution.

title: Kanya Kelavani Yojana (Gujarat)
description: Gujarat government initiative to improve girls' enrollment and retention in primary schools by providing incentives including scholarships and school materials.
benefits: Free textbooks, uniforms, stationery, and attendance incentives for girl students in government schools.
application_process: Automatic for girls enrolled in Gujarat government schools; register through school office.

title: Indira Rasoi Yojana (Rajasthan)
description: Rajasthan government scheme providing hygienic, nutritious, and subsidized meals at ₹8 per meal through government-funded community canteens.
benefits: Full meal (dal, bati/roti, vegetables, chapati) at ₹8 per plate at Indira Rasoi canteens.
application_process: Visit nearest Indira Rasoi canteen in any urban area of Rajasthan; no prior registration required.

title: Gujarat Affordable Housing Scheme for EWS/LIG
description: Provides affordable housing units at below-market prices to EWS and LIG households in Gujarat urban areas under PMAY-Urban state component.
benefits: Affordable housing units at below-market rate with PMAY interest subsidy; priority for women beneficiaries.
application_process: Apply through Gujarat Housing Board or PMAY-U portal for affordable housing allotment.

title: UP Vridhavastha Samman Pension Yojana
description: Monthly social security pension for senior citizens above 60 years in Uttar Pradesh from economically backward families.
benefits: ₹1,000/month pension directly transferred to bank account of eligible senior citizens in UP.
application_process: Apply on sspy-up.gov.in or at Tehsil/District Social Welfare Office in Uttar Pradesh.

title: Delhi Electric Vehicle Policy Subsidy
description: Delhi government provides purchase incentive subsidy on electric two-wheelers, three-wheelers, and four-wheelers to reduce air pollution.
benefits: Subsidy of ₹5,000–₹1.5 lakh depending on vehicle type; road tax and registration fee waiver.
application_process: Apply through evvahan.delhi.gov.in after vehicle purchase; subsidy directly credited to bank.

title: Mukhyamantri Digital Seva Yojana (Rajasthan)
description: Provides free smartphones with internet connectivity to women of eligible families in Rajasthan to enhance digital empowerment.
benefits: Free smartphone with 3-year internet connectivity to women heads of NFSA/Chiranjeevi families.
application_process: Beneficiaries identified from Jan Aadhar and NFSA database; phones distributed at camp.

title: Vahli Dikri Yojana (Gujarat)
description: Financial assistance scheme for Gujarat girl children providing benefits at birth, school admission, and on turning 18 as a corpus to support higher education or marriage.
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Gujarat
benefits: ₹4,000 at Class 1, ₹6,000 at Class 9, and ₹1 lakh at 18 years for education/marriage for first two daughters.
application_process: Apply at nearest Anganwadi or WCD office or digitally at e-Samaj Kalyan portal.

title: Digital India Mission
description: Flagship programme to transform India into a digitally empowered knowledge economy through digital infrastructure, digital services, and digital literacy.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
benefits: Access to digital services, e-governance portals, broadband connectivity, and citizen-centric digital applications.
application_process: Access digital services at digitalindia.gov.in, CSC centres, and government e-portals.

title: BharatNet – Rural Broadband Connectivity
description: Provides high-speed broadband connectivity to all Gram Panchayats in India enabling access to e-governance, telemedicine, e-education, and digital commerce in rural areas.
benefits: High-speed optical fibre broadband at Gram Panchayat level enabling affordable internet to rural citizens.
application_process: Internet access provided through CSC, Gram Panchayat Wi-Fi hotspots, and ISP partners.

title: Common Service Centres Scheme
description: Nationwide network of ICT-enabled common service centres delivering government and private services in banking, insurance, health, agriculture, and education to rural citizens.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
benefits: Access to 400+ digital services including Aadhaar, insurance, banking, ration, and certificates at village level.
documents: Aadhaar Card or relevant documents as per service
application_process: Visit nearest CSC centre or locate one at locator.csccloud.in.

title: UMANG – Unified Mobile Application for New-age Governance
description: Single mobile platform providing access to 1,200+ central and state government services in areas of health, education, agriculture, and finance.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
benefits: Single app access to EPF, NPS, income tax, passport, Aadhaar, and 1,200+ government services.
documents: Aadhaar Card or as per service
application_process: Download UMANG app from Play Store or App Store and log in with mobile number and OTP.

title: DigiLocker – Digital Document Wallet
description: Cloud-based platform for issuance and verification of documents and certificates digitally, eliminating the need to carry physical documents for government services.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
benefits: Secure digital storage for marksheets, driving licences, Aadhaar, PAN, voter ID, and all government documents.
application_process: Register at digilocker.gov.in or DigiLocker app with Aadhaar-linked mobile number.

title: PM-WANI – Public Wi-Fi Access Network Interface
description: Creates a network of public Wi-Fi hotspots across India through local shops and entrepreneurs acting as Public Data Offices for affordable internet access.
benefits: Affordable high-speed public Wi-Fi access at tea stalls, kirana shops, and public spaces nationwide.
application_process: Connect to PM-WANI hotspot on mobile and authenticate with OTP; no registration required.

title: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission
description: Creates a digital health ecosystem connecting health records, facilities, and professionals through Aadhaar-linked Ayushman Bharat Health Accounts for every citizen.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefits: ABHA health ID for storing digital health records; easy sharing with doctors and hospitals.
application_process: Create ABHA health ID at abdm.gov.in or through Aarogya Setu app.

title: Women Entrepreneurship Platform (WEP)
description: NITI Aayog platform connecting women entrepreneurs to mentors, investors, incubators, and markets to support scaling of women-led businesses.
benefits: Mentorship, investor connect, incubation linkage, and market access platform for women entrepreneurs.
application_process: Register on wep.gov.in with business details and access mentor/investor network.

title: Atal Innovation Mission – Atal Tinkering Labs
description: Promotes innovation culture among school students by setting up Atal Tinkering Labs in schools with STEM equipment, mentorship, and maker-space facilities.
benefits: Access to 3D printers, robotics kits, IoT tools, and mentorship in school ATLs; competition funding.
application_process: Students access ATL through their school; schools apply at aim.gov.in for ATL setup grant.

title: Atal Incubation Centres – Startup Support
description: Establishes world-class incubation facilities at universities, institutions, and industry campuses to support startups across India with funding, mentorship, and infrastructure.
benefits: Incubation support, seed funding up to ₹10 crore for AIC setup; startups get office space, mentors, and networks.
application_process: Apply through aim.gov.in for incubation support at nearest Atal Incubation Centre.

title: National Supercomputing Mission
description: Builds supercomputing infrastructure across research institutions and IITs to enhance computing capability for research in climate, pharmaceuticals, astrophysics, and AI.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
benefits: Access to high-performance computing for research at IITs, IISc, and national labs.
application_process: Apply for HPC access through your research institution connected to the NSM grid.

title: MeitY Startup Hub
description: Supports technology startups through incubation, funding, mentorship, and international exposure programs in areas of AI, IoT, fintech, and deep tech.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
benefits: Seed funding up to ₹25 lakh, incubation support, mentorship, IP assistance, and market linkage.
application_process: Apply through msh.meity.gov.in or partner incubators of MeitY Startup Hub.

title: SERB – Science and Engineering Research Board Grants
description: Provides competitive research grants to individual scientists and engineers at universities and research institutions for basic and applied science research.
benefits: Research grants of ₹15 lakh to ₹1 crore+ under CRG, MATRICS, SRG, and POWER schemes.
application_process: Apply through online SERB portal at serbonline.in during the open call period.

title: WOS-A – Women Scientist Scheme for Research in Science and Technology
description: Provides research opportunities to women scientists who have had career breaks due to family responsibilities, enabling re-entry into mainstream science.
benefits: Research grant up to ₹30 lakh over 3 years plus fellowship of ₹55,000/month for research re-entry.
application_process: Apply through online DST portal during the open call for WOS-A scheme applications.

title: National Innovation Foundation – Grassroots Innovators Support
description: Scouting, documentation, protection, and commercialization support for grassroots innovations and traditional knowledge of rural and tribal communities.
benefits: IP filing support, prototype development, commercialization assistance, and award of up to ₹1 lakh for innovators.
application_process: Submit innovation to NIF at nif.org.in or through Honey Bee Network or Sristi portal.

title: Khelo India Programme
description: Mass sports development programme to create a sporting culture at the grassroots level in India by identifying young talent and nurturing excellence.
ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
benefits: ₹5 lakh/year scholarship for 8 years for selected Khelo India athletes; equipment, coaching, and competition.
application_process: Participate in Khelo India Games or apply through state sports authority for talent identification.

title: Target Olympic Podium Scheme
description: Provides elite training, international exposure, equipment, and financial support to India's top Olympic potential athletes targeting podium finishes.
ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
benefits: Out-of-pocket expense allowance, foreign training, best equipment, sports science support, and competition sponsorship.
application_process: Recommended by National Sports Federations; Mission Olympics Cell selects athletes for TOP scheme.

title: Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna Award
description: Highest sporting honour in India given annually for spectacular and most outstanding performance in sports over four years by the Ministry of Sports.
ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
benefits: Cash award of ₹25 lakh, certificate, and memento from the President of India.
application_process: Nominated by National Federation; selected by Committee of Honour under the Ministry of Sports.

title: Arjuna Award for Outstanding Performance in Sports
description: National sports award recognizing consistent outstanding performance over four years in international competitions by Indian athletes.
ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
benefits: Cash award of ₹15 lakh, Arjuna statuette, and certificate from the President of India.
application_process: Nominated by respective National Sports Federation; selected by sports awards committee.

title: National Sports Development Fund
description: Provides financial support to promising athletes for training, coaching, sports science, equipment, and competition participation for elite sport development.
ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
benefits: Annual grants for training, equipment, foreign exposure, and coaching of elite athletes from NSDF corpus.
application_process: Apply through respective National Sport Federation for NSDF support.

title: National Culture Fund
description: Partners with corporate sponsors and NGOs for conservation of cultural heritage sites, performing arts, and intangible cultural heritage of India.
benefits: Grants for preservation of cultural heritage, conservation of monuments, and promotion of performing arts.
application_process: Apply through ncf-india.com with a cultural preservation project proposal for grant consideration.

title: Sangeet Natak Akademi Awards and Fellowships
description: National-level recognition and financial support to outstanding artists in music, dance, drama, folk arts, puppetry, and allied performing arts.
benefits: Sangeet Natak Akademi Award: ₹1 lakh + Tamrapatra; Fellowship: ₹3 lakh/year for life.
application_process: Nominated by Cultural Academies or expert committees; not a direct application scheme.

title: Lalit Kala Akademi – National Awards and Artist Fellowships
description: Recognizes and supports visual artists including painters, sculptors, printmakers, and photographers with national awards and fellowships.
benefits: National award of ₹1 lakh; fellowships up to ₹3 lakh; residencies and exhibition funding.
application_process: Apply for exhibitions or camps through lalitkala.gov.in; awards are nomination-based.

title: Sahitya Akademi Award and Fellowship
description: India's highest literary honour recognizing outstanding works in 24 Indian languages with annual awards and senior fellowships.
benefits: Sahitya Akademi Award: ₹1 lakh + Tamrapatra; Sahitya Akademi Fellowship: ₹3 lakh/year for life.
application_process: Awards recommended by language advisory boards; not a direct application scheme.

title: TRIFED – Tribal Craft Development and Market Linkage
description: Promotes tribal art, craft, and cultural products through market linkage, Tribes India retail outlets, and e-commerce enabling tribal artisans to earn better.
benefits: Market linkage for tribal crafts, direct selling on Tribes India portal, skill training, and design support.
application_process: Register with TRIFED or State Tribal Cooperative Marketing Federation at trifed.in.

title: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Placement-linked skill training for rural poor youth enabling them to access wage employment in organized sector with social protection benefits.
benefits: Free residential skill training (3–12 months), placement guarantee, post-placement support, and EPF coverage.
application_process: Register through RSETI or PIAs implementing DDU-GKY in your district or at ddugky.gov.in.

title: Jan Shikshan Sansthan
description: Provides vocational and life skills training to non-literate, neo-literate, and school dropout populations including migrant workers in urban and rural areas.
benefits: Free short-term vocational training (3–6 months) in trades like tailoring, beauty, electrical, and driving.
application_process: Contact nearest Jan Shikshan Sansthan in your district or apply through samagrasaksharta.nic.in.

title: SANKALP – Skills Acquisition and Knowledge Awareness for Livelihood Promotion
description: World Bank-assisted scheme improving quality and market-relevance of skill training in India through institutional reforms, quality assurance, and inclusion.
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
benefits: Quality-certified skill training with industry-relevant curriculum and improved placement outcomes.
application_process: Apply through SANKALP-funded training providers or at state skill development mission.

title: SVAMITVA Scheme – Survey of Villages and Mapping
description: Uses drone technology to survey rural inhabited areas and provide property cards to rural household owners, reducing land disputes and enabling credit access.
benefits: Legal property card (Adhikar Patra) for rural residential properties enabling bank loans and reducing disputes.
application_process: Survey conducted by state government using drones; property card delivered through Gram Panchayat.

title: ISRO Young Scientist Programme (YUVIKA)
description: Residential programme for school students to learn about space science, space technology, and space applications with hands-on experience at ISRO centres.
benefits: Free 2-week residential space science programme at ISRO facilities with exposure to satellite, rocket, and astronomy.
application_process: Apply through ISRO Young Scientist Programme portal when annual applications open at isro.gov.in.

title: DBT Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC) Grants
description: Supports biotech startups and SMEs in translational research, product development, and clinical trials through competitive grants and equity funding.
benefits: Grants of ₹50 lakh to ₹5 crore for biotech R&D; equity funding for early-stage biotech startups.
application_process: Apply through birac.nic.in under SPARSH, BIG, BIPP, or PACE scheme depending on stage.

title: Nehru Yuva Kendra Sangathan – Youth Development
description: Empowers rural youth through non-formal education, volunteer activities, leadership training, and national integration programmes across districts.
ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
benefits: Free training in leadership, life skills, community service; exposure camps, youth clubs, and adventure programs.
application_process: Join nearest Nehru Yuva Kendra-affiliated youth club or contact district NYKS office.

title: National Service Scheme
description: Develops personality and character of college and higher secondary school students through community service, social work, and voluntary activities.
ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
benefits: Personality development, community service, NSS certificate, and NSS Award eligibility (₹1.5 lakh).
application_process: Enroll in NSS unit at college or school; contact NSS programme officer for registration.

title: National Cadet Corps Scholarship and Benefits
description: Military cadet training programme for school and college students providing discipline, leadership, adventure activities, and priority in recruitment for armed forces.
benefits: NCC Certificate (A/B/C), priority in defence recruitment, adventure camps, annual training camps.
application_process: Enroll in NCC unit at school or college; contact Principal or NCC Officer for joining.

title: Cyber Surakshit Bharat Programme
description: Capacity building programme for government officials to improve awareness of cyber threats and equip them with knowledge to deal with cyber incidents.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
benefits: Free cybersecurity awareness training, certifications, and workshops for government and public.
application_process: Register for training workshops at meity.gov.in or csb.gov.in.

title: NIFT – National Institute of Fashion Technology Scholarship
description: NIFT provides merit-cum-means scholarships to students from economically weaker sections enrolled in its undergraduate and postgraduate design and management programs.
benefits: Full tuition waiver to partial fee support for economically weak NIFT students; additional SC/ST stipend.
application_process: Apply for scholarship after NIFT admission through the institute's scholarship portal.

title: National Film Development Corporation Support
description: Provides financial support for quality film production, distribution, and promotion of Indian cinema including regional and documentary films.
benefits: Low-interest loans, distribution support, and grants for quality film production in India.
application_process: Submit film proposal to NFDC at nfdcindia.com for loan or production support.

title: FutureSkills Prime – Digital Skills Programme
description: Reskilling and upskilling programme for IT professionals and graduates in emerging technologies like AI, ML, cybersecurity, cloud, and IoT.
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
benefits: Subsidized or free online courses in 10 emerging technologies with industry-recognized certification.
application_process: Register on futureskillsprime.in and enroll in preferred technology course.

title: Para Sports Promotion Scheme
description: Supports development of para-sports in India by funding training, equipment, coaching, and competition for athletes with disabilities.
ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
benefits: Funding for equipment, coaching, national camp, and international competition for para-athletes.
application_process: Apply through Paralympic Committee of India or state para sports association.

title: Fit India Movement
description: National movement encouraging citizens to incorporate physical activity and sports in their daily lives through awareness campaigns, fitness challenges, and school programs.
ministry: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports
benefits: Free access to fitness programs, school competitions, Fit India certification for institutions.
application_process: Register at fitindia.gov.in to participate in Fit India challenges and competitions.

title: INTACH Adopt a Heritage Scheme
description: Enables citizens, corporates, and organizations to adopt and maintain heritage sites and monuments across India through public-private partnership.
benefits: CSR credit, recognition certificate, branding at heritage site for adopters; improved heritage facilities for visitors.
application_process: Apply to Archaeological Survey of India or INTACH at adoptaheritage.gov.in.
